   329→
   330→            <!-- 출력 탭 — 비트 클릭으로 ON/OFF 토글 -->
   331→            <TabItem Header="출력 (MW0200~0209)">
   332→                <Grid>
   333→                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
   334→                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
   335→                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
   336→                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>
   337→                    <StackPanel Grid.Row="0" Orientation="Horizontal" Background="#333337" Margin="0,0,0,2">
   338→                        <Button Content="이름 저장" Width="80" Height="24" Margin="4,3"
   339→                                Click="BtnSaveNames_Click" Background="#007ACC" Foreground="White"
   340→                                BorderThickness="0" FontSize="11"/>
   341→                        <TextBlock Text="이름 컬럼 더블클릭으로 편집" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"
   342→                                   VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="8,0"/>
   343→                    </StackPanel>
   344→                    <ScrollViewer Grid.Row="1" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
   345→                        <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding OutputWords}">
   346→                            <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
   347→                                <DataTemplate>
   348→                                    <Border Margin="4" Padding="6" Background="#252526"
   349→                                            BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4">
   350→                                        <StackPanel>
   351→                                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,4">
   352→                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
   353→                                                           Foreground="#CE9178" FontSize="14"/>
   354→                                                <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080"/>
   355→                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE"/>
   356→                                                <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080"/>
   357→                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
   358→                                                           FontFamily="Consolas"/>
   359→                                                <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080"/>
   360→                                            </StackPanel>
   361→                                            <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0,2"
   362→                                                     IsReadOnly="False"
   363→                                                     RowStyle="{StaticResource OutputRowStyle}">
   364→                                                <DataGrid.Columns>
   365→                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="SET" Width="50">
   366→                                                        <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
   367→                                                            <DataTemplate>
   368→                                                                <Button Click="BtnOutputToggle_Click"
   369→                                                                        Tag="{Binding}"
   370→                                                                        CommandParameter="{Binding DataContext, RelativeSource={RelativeSource AncestorType=DataGrid}}"
   371→                                                                        Height="20" Width="40"
   372→                                                                        FontSize="10" FontWeight="Bold"
   373→                                                                        BorderThickness="0" Cursor="Hand"
   374→                                                                        Focusable="False">
   375→                                                                    <Button.Style>
   376→                                                                        <Style TargetType="Button">
   377→                                                                            <Setter Property="Content" Value="OFF"/>
   378→                                                                            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#444"/>
   379→                                                                            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#999"/>
   380→                                                                            <Style.Triggers>
   381→                                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
   382→                                                                                    <Setter Property="Content" Value="ON"/>
   383→                                                                                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#FF9800"/>
   384→                                                                                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="White"/>
   385→                                                                                </DataTrigger>
   386→                                                                            </Style.Triggers>
   387→                                                                        </Style>
   388→                                                                    </Button.Style>
   389→                                                                </Button>
   390→                                                            </DataTemplate>
   391→                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
   392→                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn>
   393→                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="24">
   394→                                                        <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
   395→                                                            <DataTemplate>
   396→                                                                <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12">
   397→                                                                    <Ellipse.Style>
   398→                                                                        <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
   399→                                                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
   400→                                                                            <Style.Triggers>
   401→                                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
   402→                                                                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#FF9800"/>
   403→                                                                                </DataTrigger>
   404→                                                                            </Style.Triggers>
   405→                                                                        </Style>
   406→                                                                    </Ellipse.Style>
   407→                                                                </Ellipse>
   408→                                                            </DataTemplate>
   409→                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
   410→                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn>
   411→                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="40"
   412→                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
   413→                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="100"
   414→                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
   415→                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
   416→                                                                       Width="200" IsReadOnly="False">
   417→                                                        <DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
   418→                                                            <Style TargetType="TextBox">
   419→                                                                <Setter Property="Background" Value="#3C3C3C"/>
   420→                                                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFD700"/>
   421→                                                                <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#007ACC"/>
   422→                                                                <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="1"/>
   423→                                                                <Setter Property="Padding" Value="2,0"/>
   424→                                                            </Style>
   425→                                                        </DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
   426→                                                    </DataGridTextColumn>
   427→                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="유닛" Binding="{Binding Unit}" Width="80"
   428→                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
   429→                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="상태" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="50"
   430→                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
   431→                                                </DataGrid.Columns>
   432→                                            </DataGrid>
   433→                                        </StackPanel>
   434→                                    </Border>
   435→                                </DataTemplate>
   436→                            </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
   437→                        </ItemsControl>
   438→                    </ScrollViewer>
   439→                </Grid>
   440→            </TabItem>
   441→
   442→            <!-- 서보·시스템 탭 -->
   443→            <TabItem Header="서보 / 시스템">
   444→                <Grid>
   445→                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
   446→                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
   447→                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
   448→                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>
   449→                    <StackPanel Grid.Row="0" Orientation="Horizontal" Background="#333337" Margin="0,0,0,2">
   450→                        <Button Content="이름 저장" Width="80" Height="24" Margin="4,3"
   451→                                Click="BtnSaveNames_Click" Background="#007ACC" Foreground="White"
   452→                                BorderThickness="0" FontSize="11"/>
   453→                        <TextBlock Text="이름 컬럼 더블클릭으로 편집" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"
   454→                                   VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="8,0"/>
   455→                    </StackPanel>
   456→                <ScrollViewer Grid.Row="1" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
   457→                    <StackPanel>
   458→                        <!-- 서보 파라미터 값 표시 -->
   459→                        <Border Margin="4" Padding="8" Background="#252526"
   460→                                BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4">
   461→                            <StackPanel>
   462→                                <TextBlock Text="서보 파라미터/상태값" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="14"
   463→                                           Foreground="#DCDCAA" Margin="0,0,0,6"/>
   464→                                <UniformGrid Columns="4" Rows="2">
   465→                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
   466→                                        <TextBlock Text="목표 위치" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
   467→                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding TargetPos}" FontFamily="Consolas"
   468→                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
   469→                                    </StackPanel>
   470→                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
   471→                                        <TextBlock Text="목표 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
   472→                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding TargetVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
   473→                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
   474→                                    </StackPanel>
   475→                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
   476→                                        <TextBlock Text="조그 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
   477→                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding JogVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
   478→                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
   479→                                    </StackPanel>
   480→                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
   481→                                        <TextBlock Text="에러 코드" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
   482→                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding ErrCode}" FontFamily="Consolas"
   483→                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#F44747"/>
   484→                                    </StackPanel>
   485→                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
   486→                                        <TextBlock Text="현재 위치 (raw)" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
   487→                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPos}" FontFamily="Consolas"
   488→                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
   489→                                    </StackPanel>
   490→                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
   491→                                        <TextBlock Text="현재 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
   492→                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
   493→                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
   494→                                    </StackPanel>
   495→                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
   496→                                        <TextBlock Text="현재 위치 (도)" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
   497→                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPosDeg}" FontFamily="Consolas"
   498→                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
   499→                                    </StackPanel>
   500→                                </UniformGrid>
   501→                            </StackPanel>
   502→                        </Border>
   503→
   504→                        <!-- 서보/시스템 비트 목록 -->
   505→                        <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding ServoSystemWords}">
   506→                            <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
   507→                                <DataTemplate>
   508→                                    <Border Margin="4" Padding="6" Background="#252526"
   509→                                            BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4">
   510→                                        <StackPanel>
   511→                                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,4">
   512→                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
   513→                                                           Foreground="#DCDCAA" FontSize="14"/>
   514→                                                <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080"/>
   515→                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE"/>
   516→                                                <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080"/>
   517→                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Direction}" Foreground="#C586C0"/>
   518→                                                <TextBlock Text="] [" Foreground="#808080"/>
   519→                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
   520→                                                           FontFamily="Consolas"/>
   521→                                                <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080"/>
   522→                                            </StackPanel>
   523→                                            <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0,2"
   524→                                                     IsReadOnly="False"
   525→                                                     RowStyle="{StaticResource ServoRowStyle}">
   526→                                                <DataGrid.Columns>
   527→                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="24">
   528→                                                        <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
   529→                                                            <DataTemplate>
   530→                                                                <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12">
   531→                                                                    <Ellipse.Style>
   532→                                                                        <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
   533→                                                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
   534→                                                                            <Style.Triggers>
   535→                                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
   536→                                                                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#2196F3"/>
   537→                                                                                </DataTrigger>
   538→                                                                            </Style.Triggers>
   539→                                                                        </Style>
   540→                                                                    </Ellipse.Style>
   541→                                                                </Ellipse>
   542→                                                            </DataTemplate>
   543→                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
   544→                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn>
   545→                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="40"
   546→                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
   547→                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="120"
   548→                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
   549→                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
   550→                                                                       Width="200" IsReadOnly="False">
   551→                                                        <DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
   552→                                                            <Style TargetType="TextBox">
   553→                                                                <Setter Property="Background" Value="#3C3C3C"/>
   554→                                                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFD700"/>
   555→                                                                <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#007ACC"/>
   556→                                                                <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="1"/>
   557→                                                                <Setter Property="Padding" Value="2,0"/>
   558→                                                            </Style>
   559→                                                        </DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
   560→                                                    </DataGridTextColumn>
   561→                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="유닛" Binding="{Binding Unit}" Width="80"
   562→                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
   563→                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="상태" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="50"
   564→                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
   565→                                                </DataGrid.Columns>
   566→                                            </DataGrid>
   567→                                        </StackPanel>
   568→                                    </Border>
   569→                                </DataTemplate>
   570→                            </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
   571→                        </ItemsControl>
   572→                    </StackPanel>
   573→                </ScrollViewer>
   574→                </Grid>
   575→            </TabItem>
   576→        </TabControl>
   577→        </Grid>
   578→
   579→        <!-- 하단: 상태바 -->
   580→        <Border Grid.Row="2" Background="#007ACC" Padding="8,4">
   581→            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
   582→                <TextBlock Text="PLC: 192.168.0.50:2004" Foreground="White" Margin="0,0,20,0"/>
   583→                <TextBlock Text="{Binding CycleMs, StringFormat='주기: {0}ms'}"
   584→                           Foreground="White" Margin="0,0,20,0"/>
   585→                <TextBlock Text="입력: MW0100~0109 | 출력: MW0200~0209 | 서보: MW0300~0501"
   586→                           Foreground="#B0D4F1"/>
   587→            </StackPanel>
   588→        </Border>
   589→    </Grid>
   590→</Window>
