toolUseResult.content:
<Window x:Class="AssembleMonitor.Features.IoMonitor.IoMonitorWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        Title="I/O 모니터 — 1CELL Assemble" Width="1920" Height="1040"
        Background="#1E1E1E" Foreground="#E0E0E0"
        WindowStartupLocation="CenterScreen" WindowState="Maximized">

    <Window.Resources>
        <BooleanToVisibilityConverter x:Key="BoolToVis"/>

        <!-- 입력 비트 ON → 녹색 배경 행 -->
        <Style x:Key="InputRowStyle" TargetType="DataGridRow">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Style.Triggers>
                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#1B3A1B"/>
                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                </DataTrigger>
            </Style.Triggers>
        </Style>

        <!-- 출력 비트 ON → 주황 배경 행 -->
        <Style x:Key="OutputRowStyle" TargetType="DataGridRow">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Style.Triggers>
                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#3A2A0A"/>
                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FF9800"/>
                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                </DataTrigger>
            </Style.Triggers>
        </Style>

        <!-- 서보/시스템 비트 ON → 파랑 배경 행 -->
        <Style x:Key="ServoRowStyle" TargetType="DataGridRow">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Style.Triggers>
                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#0A1A3A"/>
                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#2196F3"/>
                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                </DataTrigger>
            </Style.Triggers>
        </Style>

        <!-- 다크 테마 기본 스타일 -->
        <Style TargetType="DataGrid">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#1E1E1E"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Setter Property="RowBackground" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="AlternatingRowBackground" Value="#2D2D30"/>
            <Setter Property="GridLinesVisibility" Value="Horizontal"/>
            <Setter Property="HorizontalGridLinesBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="HeadersVisibility" Value="Column"/>
            <Setter Property="AutoGenerateColumns" Value="False"/>
            <Setter Property="IsReadOnly" Value="True"/>
            <Setter Property="CanUserAddRows" Value="False"/>
            <Setter Property="CanUserResizeRows" Value="False"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="11"/>
            <Setter Property="RowHeight" Value="22"/>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="DataGridColumnHeader">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#333337"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="4,3"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0,0,1,1"/>
            <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="SemiBold"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="11"/>
        </Style>
    </Window.Resources>

    <Grid>
        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
        </Grid.RowDefinitions>

        <!-- 상단: 연결 상태 + PLC 인디케이터 -->
        <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#333337" Padding="8,4">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                <Button Content="연결" Width="60" Height="26" Margin="0,0,6,0"
                        Click="BtnConnect_Click" Background="#007ACC" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="11"/>
                <Button Content="해제" Width="60" Height="26" Margin="0,0,12,0"
                        Click="BtnDisconnect_Click" Background="#C62828" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="11"/>
                <TextBlock Text="{Binding ConnectionStatus}" VerticalAlignment="Center"
                           FontSize="12" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>

                <!-- PLC 상태 LED -->
                <Border Margin="16,0,0,0" Padding="4,2" Background="#252526" CornerRadius="3">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcCommOk}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="COMM" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="10" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcRun}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="RUN" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="10" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcEmoActive}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#F44336"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="EMO" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="10" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcWdTimeout}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#FF9800"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="WD" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="10" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcServoErr}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#F44336"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="SERVO" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="10" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Border>

                <Button Content="이름 저장" Width="70" Height="26" Margin="16,0,0,0"
                        Click="BtnSaveNames_Click" Background="#007ACC" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontSize="11"/>
            </StackPanel>
        </Border>

        <!-- 메인: 3컬럼 (입력 | 출력 | 서보+시스템) -->
        <Grid Grid.Row="1" Margin="2,2,2,0">
            <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="2"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="2"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
            </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

            <!-- ===== 입력 컬럼 ===== -->
            <Border Grid.Column="0" BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" Margin="1">
                <Grid>
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                    <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#1B3A1B" Padding="6,4">
                        <TextBlock Text="입력 (MW0100~0109)" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12" Foreground="#4CAF50"/>
                    </Border>
                    <ScrollViewer Grid.Row="1" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                        <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding InputWords}">
                            <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                                <DataTemplate>
                                    <Border Margin="2,2,2,0" Padding="4" Background="#252526"
                                            BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="0,0,0,1">
                                        <StackPanel>
                                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,2">
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                           Foreground="#569CD6" FontSize="11"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE" FontSize="11"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
                                                           FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="11"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                            </StackPanel>
                                            <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0"
                                                     IsReadOnly="False"
                                                     RowStyle="{StaticResource InputRowStyle}">
                                                <DataGrid.Columns>
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="20">
                                                        <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                            <DataTemplate>
                                                                <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10">
                                                                    <Ellipse.Style>
                                                                        <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
                                                                            <Style.Triggers>
                                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                                                                                </DataTrigger>
                                                                            </Style.Triggers>
                                                                        </Style>
                                                                    </Ellipse.Style>
                                                                </Ellipse>
                                                            </DataTemplate>
                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="30"
                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="80"
                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                                                                       Width="*" IsReadOnly="False">
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
                                                            <Style TargetType="TextBox">
                                                                <Setter Property="Background" Value="#3C3C3C"/>
                                                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFD700"/>
                                                                <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#007ACC"/>
                                                            </Style>
                                                        </DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
                                                    </DataGridTextColumn>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="30"
                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                </DataGrid.Columns>
                                            </DataGrid>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                    </Border>
                                </DataTemplate>
                            </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                        </ItemsControl>
                    </ScrollViewer>
                </Grid>
            </Border>

            <!-- 구분선1 -->
            <GridSplitter Grid.Column="1" Width="2" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                          Background="#3F3F46"/>

            <!-- ===== 출력 컬럼 ===== -->
            <Border Grid.Column="2" BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" Margin="1">
                <Grid>
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                    <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#3A2A0A" Padding="6,4">
                        <TextBlock Text="출력 (MW0200~0209)" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12" Foreground="#FF9800"/>
                    </Border>
                    <ScrollViewer Grid.Row="1" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                        <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding OutputWords}">
                            <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                                <DataTemplate>
                                    <Border Margin="2,2,2,0" Padding="4" Background="#252526"
                                            BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="0,0,0,1">
                                        <StackPanel>
                                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,2">
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                           Foreground="#CE9178" FontSize="11"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE" FontSize="11"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
                                                           FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="11"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                            </StackPanel>
                                            <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0"
                                                     IsReadOnly="False"
                                                     RowStyle="{StaticResource OutputRowStyle}">
                                                <DataGrid.Columns>
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="SET" Width="38">
                                                        <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                            <DataTemplate>
                                                                <Button Click="BtnOutputToggle_Click"
                                                                        Tag="{Binding}"
                                                                        CommandParameter="{Binding DataContext, RelativeSource={RelativeSource AncestorType=DataGrid}}"
                                                                        Height="18" Width="32"
                                                                        FontSize="9" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                                        BorderThickness="0" Cursor="Hand"
                                                                        Focusable="False">
                                                                    <Button.Style>
                                                                        <Style TargetType="Button">
                                                                            <Setter Property="Content" Value="OFF"/>
                                                                            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#444"/>
                                                                            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#999"/>
                                                                            <Style.Triggers>
                                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                    <Setter Property="Content" Value="ON"/>
                                                                                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#FF9800"/>
                                                                                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="White"/>
                                                                                </DataTrigger>
                                                                            </Style.Triggers>
                                                                        </Style>
                                                                    </Button.Style>
                                                                </Button>
                                                            </DataTemplate>
                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="20">
                                                        <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                            <DataTemplate>
                                                                <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10">
                                                                    <Ellipse.Style>
                                                                        <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
                                                                            <Style.Triggers>
                                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#FF9800"/>
                                                                                </DataTrigger>
                                                                            </Style.Triggers>
                                                                        </Style>
                                                                    </Ellipse.Style>
                                                                </Ellipse>
                                                            </DataTemplate>
                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="30"
                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="80"
                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                                                                       Width="*" IsReadOnly="False">
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
                                                            <Style TargetType="TextBox">
                                                                <Setter Property="Background" Value="#3C3C3C"/>
                                                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFD700"/>
                                                                <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#007ACC"/>
                                                            </Style>
                                                        </DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
                                                    </DataGridTextColumn>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="30"
                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                </DataGrid.Columns>
                                            </DataGrid>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                    </Border>
                                </DataTemplate>
                            </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                        </ItemsControl>
                    </ScrollViewer>
                </Grid>
            </Border>

            <!-- 구분선2 -->
            <GridSplitter Grid.Column="3" Width="2" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                          Background="#3F3F46"/>

            <!-- ===== 서보+시스템 컬럼 ===== -->
            <Border Grid.Column="4" BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" Margin="1">
                <Grid>
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                    <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#0A1A3A" Padding="6,4">
                        <TextBlock Text="서보 / 시스템" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12" Foreground="#2196F3"/>
                    </Border>
                    <ScrollViewer Grid.Row="1" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                        <StackPanel>
                            <!-- 서보 파라미터 값 표시 -->
                            <Border Margin="2,2,2,0" Padding="6" Background="#252526"
                                    BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="0,0,0,1">
                                <StackPanel>
                                    <TextBlock Text="서보 파라미터/상태값" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="11"
                                               Foreground="#DCDCAA" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                                    <UniformGrid Columns="2" Rows="4">
                                        <StackPanel Margin="2">
                                            <TextBlock Text="목표 위치" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding TargetPos}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                       FontSize="14" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <StackPanel Margin="2">
                                            <TextBlock Text="목표 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding TargetVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                       FontSize="14" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <StackPanel Margin="2">
                                            <TextBlock Text="현재 위치 (raw)" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPos}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                       FontSize="14" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <StackPanel Margin="2">
                                            <TextBlock Text="현재 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                       FontSize="14" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <StackPanel Margin="2">
                                            <TextBlock Text="현재 위치 (도)" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPosDeg}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                       FontSize="14" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <StackPanel Margin="2">
                                            <TextBlock Text="조그 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding JogVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                       FontSize="14" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <StackPanel Margin="2">
                                            <TextBlock Text="에러 코드" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding ErrCode}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                       FontSize="14" Foreground="#F44747"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                    </UniformGrid>
                                </StackPanel>
                            </Border>

                            <!-- 서보/시스템 비트 목록 -->
                            <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding ServoSystemWords}">
                                <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                                    <DataTemplate>
                                        <Border Margin="2,2,2,0" Padding="4" Background="#252526"
                                                BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="0,0,0,1">
                                            <StackPanel>
                                                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,2">
                                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                               Foreground="#DCDCAA" FontSize="11"/>
                                                    <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE" FontSize="11"/>
                                                    <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding Direction}" Foreground="#C586C0" FontSize="11"/>
                                                    <TextBlock Text="] [" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
                                                               FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="11"/>
                                                    <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                                </StackPanel>
                                                <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0"
                                                         IsReadOnly="False"
                                                         RowStyle="{StaticResource ServoRowStyle}">
                                                    <DataGrid.Columns>
                                                        <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="20">
                                                            <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                                <DataTemplate>
                                                                    <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10">
                                                                        <Ellipse.Style>
                                                                            <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                                                                <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
                                                                                <Style.Triggers>
                                                                                    <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                        <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#2196F3"/>
                                                                                    </DataTrigger>
                                                                                </Style.Triggers>
                                                                            </Style>
                                                                        </Ellipse.Style>
                                                                    </Ellipse>
                                                                </DataTemplate>
                                                            </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="30"
                                                                           IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="80"
                                                                           IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                                                                           Width="*" IsReadOnly="False">
                                                            <DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
                                                                <Style TargetType="TextBox">
                                                                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#3C3C3C"/>
                                                                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFD700"/>
                                                                    <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#007ACC"/>
                                                                </Style>
                                                            </DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
                                                        </DataGridTextColumn>
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="30"
                                                                           IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                    </DataGrid.Columns>
                                                </DataGrid>
                                            </StackPanel>
                                        </Border>
                                    </DataTemplate>
                                </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                            </ItemsControl>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </ScrollViewer>
                </Grid>
            </Border>
        </Grid>

        <!-- 하단: 상태바 -->
        <Border Grid.Row="2" Background="#007ACC" Padding="6,3">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                <TextBlock Text="PLC: 192.168.0.50:2004" Foreground="White" Margin="0,0,16,0" FontSize="11"/>
                <TextBlock Text="{Binding CycleMs, StringFormat='주기: {0}ms'}"
                           Foreground="White" Margin="0,0,16,0" FontSize="11"/>
                <TextBlock Text="입력: MW0100~0109 | 출력: MW0200~0209 | 서보: MW0300~0501"
                           Foreground="#B0D4F1" FontSize="11"/>
            </StackPanel>
        </Border>
    </Grid>
</Window>

toolUseResult.originalFile:
<Window x:Class="AssembleMonitor.Features.IoMonitor.IoMonitorWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        Title="I/O 모니터 — 1CELL Assemble" Width="1200" Height="800"
        Background="#1E1E1E" Foreground="#E0E0E0"
        WindowStartupLocation="CenterScreen">

    <Window.Resources>
        <!-- ON 비트 색상 변환기 -->
        <BooleanToVisibilityConverter x:Key="BoolToVis"/>

        <!-- 비트 ON/OFF 색상 -->
        <Style x:Key="BitIndicator" TargetType="Border">
            <Setter Property="Width" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="Height" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="CornerRadius" Value="7"/>
            <Setter Property="Margin" Value="2,0"/>
        </Style>

        <!-- 입력 비트 ON → 녹색 배경 행 -->
        <Style x:Key="InputRowStyle" TargetType="DataGridRow">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Style.Triggers>
                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#1B3A1B"/>
                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                </DataTrigger>
            </Style.Triggers>
        </Style>

        <!-- 출력 비트 ON → 주황 배경 행 -->
        <Style x:Key="OutputRowStyle" TargetType="DataGridRow">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Style.Triggers>
                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#3A2A0A"/>
                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FF9800"/>
                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                </DataTrigger>
            </Style.Triggers>
        </Style>

        <!-- 서보/시스템 비트 ON → 파랑 배경 행 -->
        <Style x:Key="ServoRowStyle" TargetType="DataGridRow">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Style.Triggers>
                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#0A1A3A"/>
                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#2196F3"/>
                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                </DataTrigger>
            </Style.Triggers>
        </Style>

        <!-- 이름 편집용 — 보기/편집 전환 -->
        <BooleanToVisibilityConverter x:Key="BoolToVisibility"/>

        <!-- 다크 테마 기본 스타일 -->
        <Style TargetType="TabControl">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="TabItem">
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#CCCCCC"/>
            <Setter Property="Template">
                <Setter.Value>
                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="TabItem">
                        <Border x:Name="Bd" Padding="12,6" Margin="1,0"
                                Background="#2D2D30" BorderThickness="1,1,1,0" BorderBrush="#3F3F46">
                            <ContentPresenter ContentSource="Header"/>
                        </Border>
                        <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                            <Trigger Property="IsSelected" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="Bd" Property="Background" Value="#007ACC"/>
                            </Trigger>
                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                    </ControlTemplate>
                </Setter.Value>
            </Setter>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="DataGrid">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#1E1E1E"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Setter Property="RowBackground" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="AlternatingRowBackground" Value="#2D2D30"/>
            <Setter Property="GridLinesVisibility" Value="Horizontal"/>
            <Setter Property="HorizontalGridLinesBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="HeadersVisibility" Value="Column"/>
            <Setter Property="AutoGenerateColumns" Value="False"/>
            <Setter Property="IsReadOnly" Value="True"/>
            <Setter Property="CanUserAddRows" Value="False"/>
            <Setter Property="CanUserResizeRows" Value="False"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="12"/>
            <Setter Property="RowHeight" Value="24"/>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="DataGridColumnHeader">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#333337"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="6,4"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0,0,1,1"/>
            <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="SemiBold"/>
        </Style>
    </Window.Resources>

    <Grid>
        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
        </Grid.RowDefinitions>

        <!-- 상단: 연결 상태 -->
        <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#333337" Padding="10,6">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                <Button Content="연결" Width="70" Height="28" Margin="0,0,8,0"
                        Click="BtnConnect_Click" Background="#007ACC" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                <Button Content="해제" Width="70" Height="28" Margin="0,0,16,0"
                        Click="BtnDisconnect_Click" Background="#C62828" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                <TextBlock Text="{Binding ConnectionStatus}" VerticalAlignment="Center"
                           FontSize="14" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>

                <!-- PLC 상태 인디케이터 -->
                <Border Margin="20,0,0,0" Padding="4,2" Background="#252526" CornerRadius="3">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcCommOk}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="COMM" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcRun}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="RUN" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcEmoActive}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#F44336"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="EMO" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcWdTimeout}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#FF9800"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="WD" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcServoErr}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#F44336"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="SERVO" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Border>
            </StackPanel>
        </Border>

        <!-- 메인: 좌=탭, 우=로그 -->
        <Grid Grid.Row="1">
            <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="5"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="350"/>
            </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

            <!-- 우측: 디버그 로그 -->
            <Border Grid.Column="2" Background="#1B1B1B" BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" Margin="0,4,4,4">
                <Grid>
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                    <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#333337" Padding="8,4">
                        <TextBlock Text="통신 로그 (디버그)" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="#DCDCAA" FontSize="12"/>
                    </Border>
                    <TextBox x:Name="TxtLog" Grid.Row="1" Text="{Binding LogText, Mode=OneWay}"
                             IsReadOnly="True" TextWrapping="Wrap" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto"
                             Background="#0D0D0D" Foreground="#22CC22" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="10.5"
                             BorderThickness="0" Padding="4" TextChanged="TxtLog_TextChanged"/>
                    <StackPanel Grid.Row="2" Orientation="Horizontal" Background="#333337" Margin="0">
                        <Button Content="{Binding LogButtonText}" Width="80" Height="24" Margin="4,3"
                                Click="BtnToggleLog_Click" Background="#555" Foreground="White"
                                BorderThickness="0" FontSize="11"/>
                        <Button Content="클리어" Width="60" Height="24" Margin="0,3"
                                Click="BtnClearLog_Click" Background="#555" Foreground="White"
                                BorderThickness="0" FontSize="11"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Grid>
            </Border>

            <!-- 좌측: GridSplitter -->
            <GridSplitter Grid.Column="1" Width="5" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                          Background="#3F3F46" Cursor="SizeWE"/>

        <TabControl Grid.Column="0" Margin="4">
            <!-- 입력 탭 -->
            <TabItem Header="입력 (MW0100~0109)">
                <Grid>
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                    <StackPanel Grid.Row="0" Orientation="Horizontal" Background="#333337" Margin="0,0,0,2">
                        <Button Content="이름 저장" Width="80" Height="24" Margin="4,3"
                                Click="BtnSaveNames_Click" Background="#007ACC" Foreground="White"
                                BorderThickness="0" FontSize="11"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="이름 컬럼 더블클릭으로 편집" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"
                                   VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="8,0"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                    <ScrollViewer Grid.Row="1" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                        <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding InputWords}">
                            <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                                <DataTemplate>
                                    <Border Margin="4" Padding="6" Background="#252526"
                                            BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4">
                                        <StackPanel>
                                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,4">
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                           Foreground="#569CD6" FontSize="14"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
                                                           FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                            </StackPanel>
                                            <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0,2"
                                                     IsReadOnly="False"
                                                     RowStyle="{StaticResource InputRowStyle}">
                                                <DataGrid.Columns>
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="24">
                                                        <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                            <DataTemplate>
                                                                <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12">
                                                                    <Ellipse.Style>
                                                                        <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
                                                                            <Style.Triggers>
                                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                                                                                </DataTrigger>
                                                                            </Style.Triggers>
                                                                        </Style>
                                                                    </Ellipse.Style>
                                                                </Ellipse>
                                                            </DataTemplate>
                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="40"
                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="100"
                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                                                                       Width="200" IsReadOnly="False">
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
                                                            <Style TargetType="TextBox">
                                                                <Setter Property="Background" Value="#3C3C3C"/>
                                                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFD700"/>
                                                                <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#007ACC"/>
                                                                <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="1"/>
                                                                <Setter Property="Padding" Value="2,0"/>
                                                            </Style>
                                                        </DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
                                                    </DataGridTextColumn>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="유닛" Binding="{Binding Unit}" Width="80"
                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="상태" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="50"
                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                </DataGrid.Columns>
                                            </DataGrid>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                    </Border>
                                </DataTemplate>
                            </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                        </ItemsControl>
                    </ScrollViewer>
                </Grid>
            </TabItem>

            <!-- 출력 탭 — 비트 클릭으로 ON/OFF 토글 -->
            <TabItem Header="출력 (MW0200~0209)">
                <Grid>
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                    <StackPanel Grid.Row="0" Orientation="Horizontal" Background="#333337" Margin="0,0,0,2">
                        <Button Content="이름 저장" Width="80" Height="24" Margin="4,3"
                                Click="BtnSaveNames_Click" Background="#007ACC" Foreground="White"
                                BorderThickness="0" FontSize="11"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="이름 컬럼 더블클릭으로 편집" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"
                                   VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="8,0"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                    <ScrollViewer Grid.Row="1" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                        <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding OutputWords}">
                            <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                                <DataTemplate>
                                    <Border Margin="4" Padding="6" Background="#252526"
                                            BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4">
                                        <StackPanel>
                                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,4">
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                           Foreground="#CE9178" FontSize="14"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
                                                           FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                            </StackPanel>
                                            <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0,2"
                                                     IsReadOnly="False"
                                                     RowStyle="{StaticResource OutputRowStyle}">
                                                <DataGrid.Columns>
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="SET" Width="50">
                                                        <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                            <DataTemplate>
                                                                <Button Click="BtnOutputToggle_Click"
                                                                        Tag="{Binding}"
                                                                        CommandParameter="{Binding DataContext, RelativeSource={RelativeSource AncestorType=DataGrid}}"
                                                                        Height="20" Width="40"
                                                                        FontSize="10" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                                        BorderThickness="0" Cursor="Hand"
                                                                        Focusable="False">
                                                                    <Button.Style>
                                                                        <Style TargetType="Button">
                                                                            <Setter Property="Content" Value="OFF"/>
                                                                            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#444"/>
                                                                            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#999"/>
                                                                            <Style.Triggers>
                                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                    <Setter Property="Content" Value="ON"/>
                                                                                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#FF9800"/>
                                                                                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="White"/>
                                                                                </DataTrigger>
                                                                            </Style.Triggers>
                                                                        </Style>
                                                                    </Button.Style>
                                                                </Button>
                                                            </DataTemplate>
                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="24">
                                                        <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                            <DataTemplate>
                                                                <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12">
                                                                    <Ellipse.Style>
                                                                        <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
                                                                            <Style.Triggers>
                                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#FF9800"/>
                                                                                </DataTrigger>
                                                                            </Style.Triggers>
                                                                        </Style>
                                                                    </Ellipse.Style>
                                                                </Ellipse>
                                                            </DataTemplate>
                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="40"
                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="100"
                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                                                                       Width="200" IsReadOnly="False">
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
                                                            <Style TargetType="TextBox">
                                                                <Setter Property="Background" Value="#3C3C3C"/>
                                                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFD700"/>
                                                                <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#007ACC"/>
                                                                <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="1"/>
                                                                <Setter Property="Padding" Value="2,0"/>
                                                            </Style>
                                                        </DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
                                                    </DataGridTextColumn>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="유닛" Binding="{Binding Unit}" Width="80"
                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="상태" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="50"
                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                </DataGrid.Columns>
                                            </DataGrid>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                    </Border>
                                </DataTemplate>
                            </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                        </ItemsControl>
                    </ScrollViewer>
                </Grid>
            </TabItem>

            <!-- 서보·시스템 탭 -->
            <TabItem Header="서보 / 시스템">
                <Grid>
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                    <StackPanel Grid.Row="0" Orientation="Horizontal" Background="#333337" Margin="0,0,0,2">
                        <Button Content="이름 저장" Width="80" Height="24" Margin="4,3"
                                Click="BtnSaveNames_Click" Background="#007ACC" Foreground="White"
                                BorderThickness="0" FontSize="11"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="이름 컬럼 더블클릭으로 편집" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"
                                   VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="8,0"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                <ScrollViewer Grid.Row="1" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                    <StackPanel>
                        <!-- 서보 파라미터 값 표시 -->
                        <Border Margin="4" Padding="8" Background="#252526"
                                BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4">
                            <StackPanel>
                                <TextBlock Text="서보 파라미터/상태값" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="14"
                                           Foreground="#DCDCAA" Margin="0,0,0,6"/>
                                <UniformGrid Columns="4" Rows="2">
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="목표 위치" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding TargetPos}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="목표 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding TargetVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="조그 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding JogVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="에러 코드" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding ErrCode}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#F44747"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="현재 위치 (raw)" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPos}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="현재 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="현재 위치 (도)" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPosDeg}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                </UniformGrid>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Border>

                        <!-- 서보/시스템 비트 목록 -->
                        <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding ServoSystemWords}">
                            <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                                <DataTemplate>
                                    <Border Margin="4" Padding="6" Background="#252526"
                                            BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4">
                                        <StackPanel>
                                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,4">
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                           Foreground="#DCDCAA" FontSize="14"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Direction}" Foreground="#C586C0"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="] [" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
                                                           FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                            </StackPanel>
                                            <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0,2"
                                                     IsReadOnly="False"
                                                     RowStyle="{StaticResource ServoRowStyle}">
                                                <DataGrid.Columns>
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="24">
                                                        <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                            <DataTemplate>
                                                                <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12">
                                                                    <Ellipse.Style>
                                                                        <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
                                                                            <Style.Triggers>
                                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#2196F3"/>
                                                                                </DataTrigger>
                                                                            </Style.Triggers>
                                                                        </Style>
                                                                    </Ellipse.Style>
                                                                </Ellipse>
                                                            </DataTemplate>
                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="40"
                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="120"
                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                                                                       Width="200" IsReadOnly="False">
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
                                                            <Style TargetType="TextBox">
                                                                <Setter Property="Background" Value="#3C3C3C"/>
                                                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFD700"/>
                                                                <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#007ACC"/>
                                                                <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="1"/>
                                                                <Setter Property="Padding" Value="2,0"/>
                                                            </Style>
                                                        </DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
                                                    </DataGridTextColumn>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="유닛" Binding="{Binding Unit}" Width="80"
                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="상태" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="50"
                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                </DataGrid.Columns>
                                            </DataGrid>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                    </Border>
                                </DataTemplate>
                            </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                        </ItemsControl>
                    </StackPanel>
                </ScrollViewer>
                </Grid>
            </TabItem>
        </TabControl>
        </Grid>

        <!-- 하단: 상태바 -->
        <Border Grid.Row="2" Background="#007ACC" Padding="8,4">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                <TextBlock Text="PLC: 192.168.0.50:2004" Foreground="White" Margin="0,0,20,0"/>
                <TextBlock Text="{Binding CycleMs, StringFormat='주기: {0}ms'}"
                           Foreground="White" Margin="0,0,20,0"/>
                <TextBlock Text="입력: MW0100~0109 | 출력: MW0200~0209 | 서보: MW0300~0501"
                           Foreground="#B0D4F1"/>
            </StackPanel>
        </Border>
    </Grid>
</Window>
