toolUseResult.originalFile:
<Window x:Class="AssembleMonitor.Features.IoMonitor.IoMonitorWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        Title="I/O 모니터 — 1CELL Assemble" Width="1920" Height="1040"
        Background="#1E1E1E" Foreground="#E0E0E0"
        WindowStartupLocation="CenterScreen" WindowState="Maximized">

    <Window.Resources>
        <BooleanToVisibilityConverter x:Key="BoolToVis"/>

        <!-- 입력 비트 ON → 녹색 배경 행 -->
        <Style x:Key="InputRowStyle" TargetType="DataGridRow">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Style.Triggers>
                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#1B3A1B"/>
                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                </DataTrigger>
            </Style.Triggers>
        </Style>

        <!-- 출력 비트 ON → 주황 배경 행 -->
        <Style x:Key="OutputRowStyle" TargetType="DataGridRow">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Style.Triggers>
                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#3A2A0A"/>
                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FF9800"/>
                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                </DataTrigger>
            </Style.Triggers>
        </Style>

        <!-- 서보/시스템 비트 ON → 파랑 배경 행 -->
        <Style x:Key="ServoRowStyle" TargetType="DataGridRow">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Style.Triggers>
                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#0A1A3A"/>
                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#2196F3"/>
                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                </DataTrigger>
            </Style.Triggers>
        </Style>

        <!-- 다크 테마 기본 스타일 -->
        <Style TargetType="DataGrid">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#1E1E1E"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Setter Property="RowBackground" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="AlternatingRowBackground" Value="#2D2D30"/>
            <Setter Property="GridLinesVisibility" Value="Horizontal"/>
            <Setter Property="HorizontalGridLinesBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="HeadersVisibility" Value="Column"/>
            <Setter Property="AutoGenerateColumns" Value="False"/>
            <Setter Property="IsReadOnly" Value="True"/>
            <Setter Property="CanUserAddRows" Value="False"/>
            <Setter Property="CanUserResizeRows" Value="False"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="10"/>
            <Setter Property="RowHeight" Value="18"/>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="DataGridColumnHeader">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#333337"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="4,3"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0,0,1,1"/>
            <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="SemiBold"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="10"/>
        </Style>
    </Window.Resources>

    <Grid>
        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
        </Grid.RowDefinitions>

        <!-- 상단: 연결 상태 + PLC 인디케이터 -->
        <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#333337" Padding="8,4">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                <Button Content="연결" Width="60" Height="26" Margin="0,0,6,0"
                        Click="BtnConnect_Click" Background="#007ACC" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="10"/>
                <Button Content="해제" Width="60" Height="26" Margin="0,0,12,0"
                        Click="BtnDisconnect_Click" Background="#C62828" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="10"/>
                <TextBlock Text="{Binding ConnectionStatus}" VerticalAlignment="Center"
                           FontSize="12" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>

                <!-- PLC 상태 LED -->
                <Border Margin="16,0,0,0" Padding="4,2" Background="#252526" CornerRadius="3">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcCommOk}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="COMM" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="10" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcRun}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="RUN" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="10" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcEmoActive}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#F44336"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="EMO" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="10" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcWdTimeout}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#FF9800"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="WD" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="10" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcServoErr}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#F44336"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="SERVO" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="10" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Border>

                <Button Content="이름 저장" Width="70" Height="26" Margin="16,0,0,0"
                        Click="BtnSaveNames_Click" Background="#007ACC" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontSize="10"/>
            </StackPanel>
        </Border>

        <!-- 메인: 3컬럼 (입력 | 출력 | 서보+시스템) -->
        <Grid Grid.Row="1" Margin="2,2,2,0">
            <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="2"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="2"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
            </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

            <!-- ===== 입력 컬럼 ===== -->
            <Border Grid.Column="0" BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" Margin="1">
                <Grid>
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                    <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#1B3A1B" Padding="6,4">
                        <TextBlock Text="입력 (MW0100~0109)" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12" Foreground="#4CAF50"/>
                    </Border>
                    <ScrollViewer Grid.Row="1" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                        <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding InputWords}">
                            <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                                <DataTemplate>
                                    <Border Margin="2,2,2,0" Padding="4" Background="#252526"
                                            BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="0,0,0,1">
                                        <StackPanel>
                                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,2">
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                           Foreground="#569CD6" FontSize="10"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE" FontSize="10"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
                                                           FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="10"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                            </StackPanel>
                                            <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0"
                                                     IsReadOnly="False"
                                                     RowStyle="{StaticResource InputRowStyle}">
                                                <DataGrid.Columns>
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="20">
                                                        <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                            <DataTemplate>
                                                                <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10">
                                                                    <Ellipse.Style>
                                                                        <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
                                                                            <Style.Triggers>
                                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                                                                                </DataTrigger>
                                                                            </Style.Triggers>
                                                                        </Style>
                                                                    </Ellipse.Style>
                                                                </Ellipse>
                                                            </DataTemplate>
                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="30"
                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="80"
                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                                                                       Width="*" IsReadOnly="False">
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
                                                            <Style TargetType="TextBox">
                                                                <Setter Property="Background" Value="#3C3C3C"/>
                                                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFD700"/>
                                                                <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#007ACC"/>
                                                            </Style>
                                                        </DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
                                                    </DataGridTextColumn>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="30"
                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                </DataGrid.Columns>
                                            </DataGrid>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                    </Border>
                                </DataTemplate>
                            </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                        </ItemsControl>
                    </ScrollViewer>
                </Grid>
            </Border>

            <!-- 구분선1 -->
            <GridSplitter Grid.Column="1" Width="2" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                          Background="#3F3F46"/>

            <!-- ===== 출력 컬럼 ===== -->
            <Border Grid.Column="2" BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" Margin="1">
                <Grid>
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                    <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#3A2A0A" Padding="6,4">
                        <TextBlock Text="출력 (MW0200~0209)" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12" Foreground="#FF9800"/>
                    </Border>
                    <ScrollViewer Grid.Row="1" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                        <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding OutputWords}">
                            <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                                <DataTemplate>
                                    <Border Margin="2,2,2,0" Padding="4" Background="#252526"
                                            BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="0,0,0,1">
                                        <StackPanel>
                                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,2">
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                           Foreground="#CE9178" FontSize="10"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE" FontSize="10"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
                                                           FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="10"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                            </StackPanel>
                                            <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0"
                                                     IsReadOnly="False"
                                                     RowStyle="{StaticResource OutputRowStyle}">
                                                <DataGrid.Columns>
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="SET" Width="38">
                                                        <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                            <DataTemplate>
                                                                <Button Click="BtnOutputToggle_Click"
                                                                        Tag="{Binding}"
                                                                        CommandParameter="{Binding DataContext, RelativeSource={RelativeSource AncestorType=DataGrid}}"
                                                                        Height="18" Width="32"
                                                                        FontSize="9" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                                        BorderThickness="0" Cursor="Hand"
                                                                        Focusable="False">
                                                                    <Button.Style>
                                                                        <Style TargetType="Button">
                                                                            <Setter Property="Content" Value="OFF"/>
                                                                            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#444"/>
                                                                            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#999"/>
                                                                            <Style.Triggers>
                                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                    <Setter Property="Content" Value="ON"/>
                                                                                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#FF9800"/>
                                                                                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="White"/>
                                                                                </DataTrigger>
                                                                            </Style.Triggers>
                                                                        </Style>
                                                                    </Button.Style>
                                                                </Button>
                                                            </DataTemplate>
                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="20">
                                                        <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                            <DataTemplate>
                                                                <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10">
                                                                    <Ellipse.Style>
                                                                        <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
                                                                            <Style.Triggers>
                                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#FF9800"/>
                                                                                </DataTrigger>
                                                                            </Style.Triggers>
                                                                        </Style>
                                                                    </Ellipse.Style>
                                                                </Ellipse>
                                                            </DataTemplate>
                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="30"
                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="80"
                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                                                                       Width="*" IsReadOnly="False">
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
                                                            <Style TargetType="TextBox">
                                                                <Setter Property="Background" Value="#3C3C3C"/>
                                                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFD700"/>
                                                                <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#007ACC"/>
                                                            </Style>
                                                        </DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
                                                    </DataGridTextColumn>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="30"
                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                </DataGrid.Columns>
                                            </DataGrid>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                    </Border>
                                </DataTemplate>
                            </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                        </ItemsControl>
                    </ScrollViewer>
                </Grid>
            </Border>

            <!-- 구분선2 -->
            <GridSplitter Grid.Column="3" Width="2" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                          Background="#3F3F46"/>

            <!-- ===== 서보+시스템 컬럼 ===== -->
            <Border Grid.Column="4" BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" Margin="1">
                <Grid>
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                    <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#0A1A3A" Padding="6,4">
                        <TextBlock Text="서보 / 시스템" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12" Foreground="#2196F3"/>
                    </Border>
                    <ScrollViewer Grid.Row="1" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                        <StackPanel>
                            <!-- 서보 파라미터 값 표시 -->
                            <Border Margin="2,2,2,0" Padding="6" Background="#252526"
                                    BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="0,0,0,1">
                                <StackPanel>
                                    <TextBlock Text="서보 파라미터/상태값" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="11"
                                               Foreground="#DCDCAA" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                                    <UniformGrid Columns="2" Rows="4">
                                        <StackPanel Margin="2">
                                            <TextBlock Text="목표 위치" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding TargetPos}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                       FontSize="14" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <StackPanel Margin="2">
                                            <TextBlock Text="목표 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding TargetVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                       FontSize="14" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <StackPanel Margin="2">
                                            <TextBlock Text="현재 위치 (raw)" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPos}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                       FontSize="14" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <StackPanel Margin="2">
                                            <TextBlock Text="현재 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                       FontSize="14" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <StackPanel Margin="2">
                                            <TextBlock Text="현재 위치 (도)" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPosDeg}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                       FontSize="14" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <StackPanel Margin="2">
                                            <TextBlock Text="조그 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding JogVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                       FontSize="14" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <StackPanel Margin="2">
                                            <TextBlock Text="에러 코드" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding ErrCode}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                       FontSize="14" Foreground="#F44747"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                    </UniformGrid>
                                </StackPanel>
                            </Border>

                            <!-- 서보/시스템 비트 목록 -->
                            <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding ServoSystemWords}">
                                <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                                    <DataTemplate>
                                        <Border Margin="2,2,2,0" Padding="4" Background="#252526"
                                                BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="0,0,0,1">
                                            <StackPanel>
                                                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,2">
                                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                               Foreground="#DCDCAA" FontSize="10"/>
                                                    <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE" FontSize="10"/>
                                                    <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding Direction}" Foreground="#C586C0" FontSize="10"/>
                                                    <TextBlock Text="] [" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
                                                               FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="10"/>
                                                    <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                                </StackPanel>
                                                <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0"
                                                         IsReadOnly="False"
                                                         RowStyle="{StaticResource ServoRowStyle}">
                                                    <DataGrid.Columns>
                                                        <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="20">
                                                            <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                                <DataTemplate>
                                                                    <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10">
                                                                        <Ellipse.Style>
                                                                            <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                                                                <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
                                                                                <Style.Triggers>
                                                                                    <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                        <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#2196F3"/>
                                                                                    </DataTrigger>
                                                                                </Style.Triggers>
                                                                            </Style>
                                                                        </Ellipse.Style>
                                                                    </Ellipse>
                                                                </DataTemplate>
                                                            </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="30"
                                                                           IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="80"
                                                                           IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                                                                           Width="*" IsReadOnly="False">
                                                            <DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
                                                                <Style TargetType="TextBox">
                                                                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#3C3C3C"/>
                                                                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFD700"/>
                                                                    <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#007ACC"/>
                                                                </Style>
                                                            </DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
                                                        </DataGridTextColumn>
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="30"
                                                                           IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                    </DataGrid.Columns>
                                                </DataGrid>
                                            </StackPanel>
                                        </Border>
                                    </DataTemplate>
                                </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                            </ItemsControl>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </ScrollViewer>
                </Grid>
            </Border>
        </Grid>

        <!-- 하단: 상태바 -->
        <Border Grid.Row="2" Background="#007ACC" Padding="6,3">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                <TextBlock Text="PLC: 192.168.0.50:2004" Foreground="White" Margin="0,0,16,0" FontSize="10"/>
                <TextBlock Text="{Binding CycleMs, StringFormat='주기: {0}ms'}"
                           Foreground="White" Margin="0,0,16,0" FontSize="10"/>
                <TextBlock Text="입력: MW0100~0109 | 출력: MW0200~0209 | 서보: MW0300~0501"
                           Foreground="#B0D4F1" FontSize="10"/>
            </StackPanel>
        </Border>
    </Grid>
</Window>

toolUseResult.originalFile:
<Window x:Class="AssembleMonitor.Features.IoMonitor.IoMonitorWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        Title="I/O 모니터 — 1CELL Assemble" Width="1920" Height="1040"
        Background="#1E1E1E" Foreground="#E0E0E0"
        WindowStartupLocation="CenterScreen" WindowState="Maximized">

    <Window.Resources>
        <BooleanToVisibilityConverter x:Key="BoolToVis"/>

        <!-- 입력 비트 ON → 녹색 배경 행 -->
        <Style x:Key="InputRowStyle" TargetType="DataGridRow">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Style.Triggers>
                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#1B3A1B"/>
                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                </DataTrigger>
            </Style.Triggers>
        </Style>

        <!-- 출력 비트 ON → 주황 배경 행 -->
        <Style x:Key="OutputRowStyle" TargetType="DataGridRow">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Style.Triggers>
                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#3A2A0A"/>
                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FF9800"/>
                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                </DataTrigger>
            </Style.Triggers>
        </Style>

        <!-- 서보/시스템 비트 ON → 파랑 배경 행 -->
        <Style x:Key="ServoRowStyle" TargetType="DataGridRow">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Style.Triggers>
                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#0A1A3A"/>
                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#2196F3"/>
                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                </DataTrigger>
            </Style.Triggers>
        </Style>

        <!-- 다크 테마 기본 스타일 -->
        <Style TargetType="DataGrid">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#1E1E1E"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Setter Property="RowBackground" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="AlternatingRowBackground" Value="#2D2D30"/>
            <Setter Property="GridLinesVisibility" Value="Horizontal"/>
            <Setter Property="HorizontalGridLinesBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="HeadersVisibility" Value="Column"/>
            <Setter Property="AutoGenerateColumns" Value="False"/>
            <Setter Property="IsReadOnly" Value="True"/>
            <Setter Property="CanUserAddRows" Value="False"/>
            <Setter Property="CanUserResizeRows" Value="False"/>
            <Setter Property="CanUserSortColumns" Value="False"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="10"/>
            <Setter Property="RowHeight" Value="18"/>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="DataGridColumnHeader">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#333337"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="4,3"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0,0,1,1"/>
            <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="SemiBold"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="10"/>
        </Style>
    </Window.Resources>

    <Grid>
        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
        </Grid.RowDefinitions>

        <!-- 상단: 연결 상태 + PLC 인디케이터 -->
        <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#333337" Padding="8,4">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                <Button Content="연결" Width="60" Height="26" Margin="0,0,6,0"
                        Click="BtnConnect_Click" Background="#007ACC" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="10"/>
                <Button Content="해제" Width="60" Height="26" Margin="0,0,12,0"
                        Click="BtnDisconnect_Click" Background="#C62828" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="10"/>
                <TextBlock Text="{Binding ConnectionStatus}" VerticalAlignment="Center"
                           FontSize="12" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>

                <!-- PLC 상태 LED -->
                <Border Margin="16,0,0,0" Padding="4,2" Background="#252526" CornerRadius="3">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcCommOk}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="COMM" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="10" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcRun}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="RUN" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="10" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcEmoActive}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#F44336"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="EMO" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="10" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcWdTimeout}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#FF9800"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="WD" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="10" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcServoErr}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#F44336"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="SERVO" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="10" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Border>

                <Button Content="이름 저장" Width="70" Height="26" Margin="16,0,0,0"
                        Click="BtnSaveNames_Click" Background="#007ACC" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontSize="10"/>
            </StackPanel>
        </Border>

        <!-- 메인: 3컬럼 (입력 | 출력 | 서보+시스템) -->
        <Grid Grid.Row="1" Margin="2,2,2,0">
            <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="2"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="2"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
            </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

            <!-- ===== 입력 컬럼 ===== -->
            <Border Grid.Column="0" BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" Margin="1">
                <Grid>
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                    <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#1B3A1B" Padding="6,4">
                        <TextBlock Text="입력 (MW0100~0109)" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12" Foreground="#4CAF50"/>
                    </Border>
                    <ScrollViewer Grid.Row="1" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                        <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding InputWords}">
                            <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                                <DataTemplate>
                                    <Border Margin="2,2,2,0" Padding="4" Background="#252526"
                                            BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="0,0,0,1">
                                        <StackPanel>
                                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,2">
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                           Foreground="#569CD6" FontSize="10"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE" FontSize="10"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
                                                           FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="10"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                            </StackPanel>
                                            <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0"
                                                     IsReadOnly="False"
                                                     RowStyle="{StaticResource InputRowStyle}">
                                                <DataGrid.Columns>
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="20">
                                                        <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                            <DataTemplate>
                                                                <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10">
                                                                    <Ellipse.Style>
                                                                        <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
                                                                            <Style.Triggers>
                                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                                                                                </DataTrigger>
                                                                            </Style.Triggers>
                                                                        </Style>
                                                                    </Ellipse.Style>
                                                                </Ellipse>
                                                            </DataTemplate>
                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="30"
                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="80"
                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                                                                       Width="*" IsReadOnly="False">
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
                                                            <Style TargetType="TextBox">
                                                                <Setter Property="Background" Value="#3C3C3C"/>
                                                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFD700"/>
                                                                <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#007ACC"/>
                                                            </Style>
                                                        </DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
                                                    </DataGridTextColumn>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="30"
                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                </DataGrid.Columns>
                                            </DataGrid>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                    </Border>
                                </DataTemplate>
                            </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                        </ItemsControl>
                    </ScrollViewer>
                </Grid>
            </Border>

            <!-- 구분선1 -->
            <GridSplitter Grid.Column="1" Width="2" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                          Background="#3F3F46"/>

            <!-- ===== 출력 컬럼 ===== -->
            <Border Grid.Column="2" BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" Margin="1">
                <Grid>
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                    <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#3A2A0A" Padding="6,4">
                        <TextBlock Text="출력 (MW0200~0209)" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12" Foreground="#FF9800"/>
                    </Border>
                    <ScrollViewer Grid.Row="1" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                        <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding OutputWords}">
                            <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                                <DataTemplate>
                                    <Border Margin="2,2,2,0" Padding="4" Background="#252526"
                                            BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="0,0,0,1">
                                        <StackPanel>
                                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,2">
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                           Foreground="#CE9178" FontSize="10"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE" FontSize="10"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
                                                           FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="10"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                            </StackPanel>
                                            <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0"
                                                     IsReadOnly="False"
                                                     RowStyle="{StaticResource OutputRowStyle}">
                                                <DataGrid.Columns>
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="SET" Width="38">
                                                        <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                            <DataTemplate>
                                                                <Button Click="BtnOutputToggle_Click"
                                                                        Tag="{Binding}"
                                                                        CommandParameter="{Binding DataContext, RelativeSource={RelativeSource AncestorType=DataGrid}}"
                                                                        Height="18" Width="32"
                                                                        FontSize="9" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                                        BorderThickness="0" Cursor="Hand"
                                                                        Focusable="False">
                                                                    <Button.Style>
                                                                        <Style TargetType="Button">
                                                                            <Setter Property="Content" Value="OFF"/>
                                                                            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#444"/>
                                                                            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#999"/>
                                                                            <Style.Triggers>
                                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                    <Setter Property="Content" Value="ON"/>
                                                                                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#FF9800"/>
                                                                                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="White"/>
                                                                                </DataTrigger>
                                                                            </Style.Triggers>
                                                                        </Style>
                                                                    </Button.Style>
                                                                </Button>
                                                            </DataTemplate>
                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="20">
                                                        <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                            <DataTemplate>
                                                                <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10">
                                                                    <Ellipse.Style>
                                                                        <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
                                                                            <Style.Triggers>
                                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#FF9800"/>
                                                                                </DataTrigger>
                                                                            </Style.Triggers>
                                                                        </Style>
                                                                    </Ellipse.Style>
                                                                </Ellipse>
                                                            </DataTemplate>
                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="30"
                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="80"
                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                                                                       Width="*" IsReadOnly="False">
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
                                                            <Style TargetType="TextBox">
                                                                <Setter Property="Background" Value="#3C3C3C"/>
                                                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFD700"/>
                                                                <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#007ACC"/>
                                                            </Style>
                                                        </DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
                                                    </DataGridTextColumn>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="30"
                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                </DataGrid.Columns>
                                            </DataGrid>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                    </Border>
                                </DataTemplate>
                            </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                        </ItemsControl>
                    </ScrollViewer>
                </Grid>
            </Border>

            <!-- 구분선2 -->
            <GridSplitter Grid.Column="3" Width="2" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                          Background="#3F3F46"/>

            <!-- ===== 서보+시스템 컬럼 ===== -->
            <Border Grid.Column="4" BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" Margin="1">
                <Grid>
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                    <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#0A1A3A" Padding="6,4">
                        <TextBlock Text="서보 / 시스템" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12" Foreground="#2196F3"/>
                    </Border>
                    <ScrollViewer Grid.Row="1" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                        <StackPanel>
                            <!-- 서보 파라미터 값 표시 -->
                            <Border Margin="2,2,2,0" Padding="6" Background="#252526"
                                    BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="0,0,0,1">
                                <StackPanel>
                                    <TextBlock Text="서보 파라미터/상태값" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="11"
                                               Foreground="#DCDCAA" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                                    <UniformGrid Columns="2" Rows="4">
                                        <StackPanel Margin="2">
                                            <TextBlock Text="목표 위치" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding TargetPos}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                       FontSize="14" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <StackPanel Margin="2">
                                            <TextBlock Text="목표 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding TargetVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                       FontSize="14" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <StackPanel Margin="2">
                                            <TextBlock Text="현재 위치 (raw)" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPos}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                       FontSize="14" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <StackPanel Margin="2">
                                            <TextBlock Text="현재 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                       FontSize="14" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <StackPanel Margin="2">
                                            <TextBlock Text="현재 위치 (도)" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPosDeg}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                       FontSize="14" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <StackPanel Margin="2">
                                            <TextBlock Text="조그 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding JogVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                       FontSize="14" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <StackPanel Margin="2">
                                            <TextBlock Text="에러 코드" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding ErrCode}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                       FontSize="14" Foreground="#F44747"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                    </UniformGrid>
                                </StackPanel>
                            </Border>

                            <!-- 서보/시스템 비트 목록 -->
                            <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding ServoSystemWords}">
                                <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                                    <DataTemplate>
                                        <Border Margin="2,2,2,0" Padding="4" Background="#252526"
                                                BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="0,0,0,1">
                                            <StackPanel>
                                                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,2">
                                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                               Foreground="#DCDCAA" FontSize="10"/>
                                                    <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE" FontSize="10"/>
                                                    <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding Direction}" Foreground="#C586C0" FontSize="10"/>
                                                    <TextBlock Text="] [" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
                                                               FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="10"/>
                                                    <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                                </StackPanel>
                                                <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0"
                                                         IsReadOnly="False"
                                                         RowStyle="{StaticResource ServoRowStyle}">
                                                    <DataGrid.Columns>
                                                        <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="20">
                                                            <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                                <DataTemplate>
                                                                    <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10">
                                                                        <Ellipse.Style>
                                                                            <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                                                                <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
                                                                                <Style.Triggers>
                                                                                    <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                        <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#2196F3"/>
                                                                                    </DataTrigger>
                                                                                </Style.Triggers>
                                                                            </Style>
                                                                        </Ellipse.Style>
                                                                    </Ellipse>
                                                                </DataTemplate>
                                                            </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="30"
                                                                           IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="80"
                                                                           IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                                                                           Width="*" IsReadOnly="False">
                                                            <DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
                                                                <Style TargetType="TextBox">
                                                                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#3C3C3C"/>
                                                                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFD700"/>
                                                                    <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#007ACC"/>
                                                                </Style>
                                                            </DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
                                                        </DataGridTextColumn>
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="30"
                                                                           IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                    </DataGrid.Columns>
                                                </DataGrid>
                                            </StackPanel>
                                        </Border>
                                    </DataTemplate>
                                </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                            </ItemsControl>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </ScrollViewer>
                </Grid>
            </Border>
        </Grid>

        <!-- 하단: 상태바 -->
        <Border Grid.Row="2" Background="#007ACC" Padding="6,3">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                <TextBlock Text="PLC: 192.168.0.50:2004" Foreground="White" Margin="0,0,16,0" FontSize="10"/>
                <TextBlock Text="{Binding CycleMs, StringFormat='주기: {0}ms'}"
                           Foreground="White" Margin="0,0,16,0" FontSize="10"/>
                <TextBlock Text="입력: MW0100~0109 | 출력: MW0200~0209 | 서보: MW0300~0501"
                           Foreground="#B0D4F1" FontSize="10"/>
            </StackPanel>
        </Border>
    </Grid>
</Window>

content.content:
빌드했습니다.
    경고 0개
    오류 0개

경과 시간: 00:00:01.61

content.text:
빌드 성공. 이제 서보 제어부 출력 토글 버튼 추가합니다.

서보 명령 비트(MW300~301)는 PC WRITE 영역이므로 출력과 동일하게 토글 버튼을 넣겠습니다. ViewModel에서 서보 명령 WORD 쓰기 메서드를 추가해야 합니다.

먼저 MemoryMapDefinition에서 서보 명령 WORD가 ServoSystemWords 몇 번째인지 확인합니다.

file.content:
using System.Collections.Generic;

namespace AssembleMonitor.Features.IoMonitor;

/// <summary>
/// MW 주소별 비트 이름 정의
/// MEMORY_MAP.md 기반
/// </summary>
public static class MemoryMapDefinition
{
    public record BitInfo(int Bit, string Address, string Name, string Unit);
    public record WordInfo(string MwAddress, string Description, string Direction, BitInfo[] Bits);

    /// <summary>
    /// 물리 입력 비트맵 (MW0100~0109)
    /// </summary>
    public static readonly WordInfo[] InputMap =
    [
        new("MW0100", "Slot00 하위 (_00_IN00~15)", "READ",
        [
            new(0, "_00_IN00", "서보 ON 접점", "메인"),
            new(1, "_00_IN01", "서보 레디", "메인"),
            new(2, "_00_IN02", "—", "미사용"),
            new(3, "_00_IN03", "—", "미사용"),
            new(4, "_00_IN04", "—", "미사용"),
            new(5, "_00_IN05", "—", "미사용"),
            new(6, "_00_IN06", "—", "미사용"),
            new(7, "_00_IN07", "—", "미사용"),
            new(8, "_00_IN08", "자동/수동 선택 SW", "메인"),
            new(9, "_00_IN09", "자동 시작 PB", "메인"),
            new(10, "_00_IN10", "자동 정지 PB", "메인"),
            new(11, "_00_IN11", "비상정지 (EMO)", "메인"),
            new(12, "_00_IN12", "전원 ON", "메인"),
            new(13, "_00_IN13", "리셋 스위치", "메인"),
            new(14, "_00_IN14", "—", "미사용"),
            new(15, "_00_IN15", "에리어 센서", "메인"),
        ]),
        new("MW0101", "Slot00 상위 (_00_IN16~31)", "READ",
        [
            new(0, "_00_IN16", "플런저 1차이송 후진", "플런저"),
            new(1, "_00_IN17", "플런저 1차이송 전진", "플런저"),
            new(2, "_00_IN18", "플런저 1차회전 후진", "플런저"),
            new(3, "_00_IN19", "플런저 1차회전 전진", "플런저"),
            new(4, "_00_IN20", "플런저 2차이송 후진", "플런저"),
            new(5, "_00_IN21", "플런저 2차이송 전진", "플런저"),
            new(6, "_00_IN22", "플런저 2차 상승", "플런저"),
            new(7, "_00_IN23", "플런저 2차 하강", "플런저"),
            new(8, "_00_IN24", "플런저 가이드 후진", "플런저"),
            new(9, "_00_IN25", "플런저 가이드 전진", "플런저"),
            new(10, "_00_IN26", "플런저 조립 후진", "플런저"),
            new(11, "_00_IN27", "플런저 조립 전진", "플런저"),
            new(12, "_00_IN28", "플런저 제품감지", "플런저"),
            new(13, "_00_IN29", "플런저 2차제품감지", "플런저"),
            new(14, "_00_IN30", "—", "미사용"),
            new(15, "_00_IN31", "구리스 도포완료", "구리스"),
        ]),
        new("MW0102", "Slot01 하위 (_01_IN00~15)", "READ",
        [
            new(0, "_01_IN00", "검사 이송 후진", "작동력"),
            new(1, "_01_IN01", "검사 이송 전진", "작동력"),
            new(2, "_01_IN02", "검사 해제 센서", "작동력"),
            new(3, "_01_IN03", "검사 가압 센서", "작동력"),
            new(4, "_01_IN04", "통전 리노핀 후진", "통전"),
            new(5, "_01_IN05", "통전 리노핀 전진", "통전"),
            new(6, "_01_IN06", "작동력 투입 센서", "작동력"),
            new(7, "_01_IN07", "—", "미사용"),
            new(8, "_01_IN08", "—", "미사용"),
            new(9, "_01_IN09", "—", "미사용"),
            new(10, "_01_IN10", "—", "미사용"),
            new(11, "_01_IN11", "—", "미사용"),
            new(12, "_01_IN12", "—", "미사용"),
            new(13, "_01_IN13", "—", "미사용"),
            new(14, "_01_IN14", "—", "미사용"),
            new(15, "_01_IN15", "—", "미사용"),
        ]),
        new("MW0103", "Slot01 상위 (_01_IN16~31)", "READ",
        [
            new(0, "_01_IN16", "불량배출 이송 후진", "불량배출"),
            new(1, "_01_IN17", "불량배출 이송 전진", "불량배출"),
            new(2, "_01_IN18", "불량배출 회전 후진", "불량배출"),
            new(3, "_01_IN19", "불량배출 회전 전진", "불량배출"),
            new(4, "_01_IN20", "불량배출 클램프 후진", "불량배출"),
            new(5, "_01_IN21", "불량배출 클램프 전진", "불량배출"),
            new(6, "_01_IN22", "인덱스 위치센서 1", "메인"),
            new(7, "_01_IN23", "인덱스 위치센서 2", "메인"),
            new(8, "_01_IN24", "네스트클램프 후진", "메인"),
            new(9, "_01_IN25", "네스트클램프 전진", "메인"),
            new(10, "_01_IN26", "코어 인덱스 1", "코어"),
            new(11, "_01_IN27", "코어 인덱스 2", "코어"),
