input.old_string:
<DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0"
                                                         IsReadOnly="False"
                                                         RowStyle="{StaticResource ServoRowStyle}">
                                                    <DataGrid.Columns>
                                                        <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="20">
                                                            <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                                <DataTemplate>
                                                                    <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10">
                                                                        <Ellipse.Style>
                                                                            <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                                                                <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
                                                                                <Style.Triggers>
                                                                                    <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                        <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#2196F3"/>
                                                                                    </DataTrigger>
                                                                                </Style.Triggers>
                                                                            </Style>
                                                                        </Ellipse.Style>
                                                                    </Ellipse>
                                                                </DataTemplate>
                                                            </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="30"
                                                                           IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="80"
                                                                           IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                                                                           Width="*" IsReadOnly="False">
                                                            <DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
                                                                <Style TargetType="TextBox">
                                                                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#3C3C3C"/>
                                                                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFD700"/>
                                                                    <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#007ACC"/>
                                                                </Style>
                                                            </DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
                                                        </DataGridTextColumn>
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="30"
                                                                           IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                    </DataGrid.Columns>
                                                </DataGrid>
input.new_string:
<DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0"
                                                         IsReadOnly="False"
                                                         RowStyle="{StaticResource ServoRowStyle}">
                                                    <DataGrid.Columns>
                                                        <!-- SET 버튼: WRITE 방향일 때만 표시 -->
                                                        <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="SET" Width="38">
                                                            <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                                <DataTemplate>
                                                                    <Button Click="BtnServoToggle_Click"
                                                                            Tag="{Binding}"
                                                                            CommandParameter="{Binding DataContext, RelativeSource={RelativeSource AncestorType=DataGrid}}"
                                                                            Height="18" Width="32"
                                                                            FontSize="9" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                                            BorderThickness="0" Cursor="Hand"
                                                                            Focusable="False"
                                                                            Visibility="{Binding DataContext.IsWritable, RelativeSource={RelativeSource AncestorType=DataGrid}, Converter={StaticResource BoolToVis}}">
                                                                        <Button.Style>
                                                                            <Style TargetType="Button">
                                                                                <Setter Property="Content" Value="OFF"/>
                                                                                <Setter Property="Background" Value="#444"/>
                                                                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#999"/>
                                                                                <Style.Triggers>
                                                                                    <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                        <Setter Property="Content" Value="ON"/>
                                                                                        <Setter Property="Background" Value="#2196F3"/>
                                                                                        <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="White"/>
                                                                                    </DataTrigger>
                                                                                </Style.Triggers>
                                                                            </Style>
                                                                        </Button.Style>
                                                                    </Button>
                                                                </DataTemplate>
                                                            </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                        <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="20">
                                                            <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                                <DataTemplate>
                                                                    <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10">
                                                                        <Ellipse.Style>
                                                                            <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                                                                <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
                                                                                <Style.Triggers>
                                                                                    <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                        <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#2196F3"/>
                                                                                    </DataTrigger>
                                                                                </Style.Triggers>
                                                                            </Style>
                                                                        </Ellipse.Style>
                                                                    </Ellipse>
                                                                </DataTemplate>
                                                            </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="30"
                                                                           IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="80"
                                                                           IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                                                                           Width="*" IsReadOnly="False">
                                                            <DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
                                                                <Style TargetType="TextBox">
                                                                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#3C3C3C"/>
                                                                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFD700"/>
                                                                    <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#007ACC"/>
                                                                </Style>
                                                            </DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
                                                        </DataGridTextColumn>
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="30"
                                                                           IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                    </DataGrid.Columns>
                                                </DataGrid>

                                                                    </Button>
                                                                </DataTemplate>
                                                            </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                        <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="20">
                                                            <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                                <DataTemplate>
                                                                    <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10">
                                                                        <Ellipse.Style>
                                                                            <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                                                                <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
                                                                                <Style.Triggers>
                                                                                    <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                        <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#2196F3"/>
                                                                                    </DataTrigger>
                                                                                </Style.Triggers>
                                                                            </Style>
                                                                        </Ellipse.Style>
                                                                    </Ellipse>
                                                                </DataTemplate>
                                                            </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="30"
                                                                           IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="80"
                                                                           IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                                                                           Width="*" IsReadOnly="False">
                                                            <DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
                                                                <Style TargetType="TextBox">
                                                                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#3C3C3C"/>
                                                                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFD700"/>
                                                                    <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#007ACC"/>
                                                                </Style>
                                                            </DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
                                                        </DataGridTextColumn>
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="30"
                                                                           IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                    </DataGrid.Columns>
                                                </DataGrid>
toolUseResult.originalFile:
<Window x:Class="AssembleMonitor.Features.IoMonitor.IoMonitorWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        Title="I/O 모니터 — 1CELL Assemble" Width="1920" Height="1040"
        Background="#1E1E1E" Foreground="#E0E0E0"
        WindowStartupLocation="CenterScreen" WindowState="Maximized">

    <Window.Resources>
        <BooleanToVisibilityConverter x:Key="BoolToVis"/>

        <!-- 입력 비트 ON → 녹색 배경 행 -->
        <Style x:Key="InputRowStyle" TargetType="DataGridRow">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Style.Triggers>
                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#1B3A1B"/>
                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                </DataTrigger>
            </Style.Triggers>
        </Style>

        <!-- 출력 비트 ON → 주황 배경 행 -->
        <Style x:Key="OutputRowStyle" TargetType="DataGridRow">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Style.Triggers>
                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#3A2A0A"/>
                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FF9800"/>
                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                </DataTrigger>
            </Style.Triggers>
        </Style>

        <!-- 서보/시스템 비트 ON → 파랑 배경 행 -->
        <Style x:Key="ServoRowStyle" TargetType="DataGridRow">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Style.Triggers>
                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#0A1A3A"/>
                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#2196F3"/>
                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                </DataTrigger>
            </Style.Triggers>
        </Style>

        <!-- 다크 테마 기본 스타일 -->
        <Style TargetType="DataGrid">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#1E1E1E"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Setter Property="RowBackground" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="AlternatingRowBackground" Value="#2D2D30"/>
            <Setter Property="GridLinesVisibility" Value="Horizontal"/>
            <Setter Property="HorizontalGridLinesBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="HeadersVisibility" Value="Column"/>
            <Setter Property="AutoGenerateColumns" Value="False"/>
            <Setter Property="IsReadOnly" Value="True"/>
            <Setter Property="CanUserAddRows" Value="False"/>
            <Setter Property="CanUserResizeRows" Value="False"/>
            <Setter Property="CanUserSortColumns" Value="False"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="10"/>
            <Setter Property="RowHeight" Value="18"/>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="DataGridColumnHeader">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#333337"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="4,3"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0,0,1,1"/>
            <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="SemiBold"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="10"/>
        </Style>
    </Window.Resources>

    <Grid>
        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
        </Grid.RowDefinitions>

        <!-- 상단: 좌=버튼+상태, 우=LED패널(고정) -->
        <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#333337" Padding="8,4">
            <DockPanel>
                <!-- 우측 고정: LED 패널 + 이름저장 -->
                <StackPanel DockPanel.Dock="Right" Orientation="Horizontal" VerticalAlignment="Center">
                    <Button Content="이름 저장" Width="70" Height="26" Margin="0,0,12,0"
                            Click="BtnSaveNames_Click" Background="#007ACC" Foreground="White"
                            BorderThickness="0" FontSize="10"/>
                    <Border Padding="4,2" Background="#252526" CornerRadius="3">
                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                            <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                                <Ellipse.Style>
                                    <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                        <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                        <Style.Triggers>
                                            <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcCommOk}" Value="True">
                                                <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                                            </DataTrigger>
                                        </Style.Triggers>
                                    </Style>
                                </Ellipse.Style>
                            </Ellipse>
                            <TextBlock Text="COMM" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="10" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>

                            <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                                <Ellipse.Style>
                                    <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                        <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                        <Style.Triggers>
                                            <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcRun}" Value="True">
                                                <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                                            </DataTrigger>
                                        </Style.Triggers>
                                    </Style>
                                </Ellipse.Style>
                            </Ellipse>
                            <TextBlock Text="RUN" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="10" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>

                            <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                                <Ellipse.Style>
                                    <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                        <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                        <Style.Triggers>
                                            <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcEmoActive}" Value="True">
                                                <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#F44336"/>
                                            </DataTrigger>
                                        </Style.Triggers>
                                    </Style>
                                </Ellipse.Style>
                            </Ellipse>
                            <TextBlock Text="EMO" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="10" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>

                            <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                                <Ellipse.Style>
                                    <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                        <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                        <Style.Triggers>
                                            <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcWdTimeout}" Value="True">
                                                <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#FF9800"/>
                                            </DataTrigger>
                                        </Style.Triggers>
                                    </Style>
                                </Ellipse.Style>
                            </Ellipse>
                            <TextBlock Text="WD" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="10" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>

                            <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                                <Ellipse.Style>
                                    <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                        <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                        <Style.Triggers>
                                            <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcServoErr}" Value="True">
                                                <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#F44336"/>
                                            </DataTrigger>
                                        </Style.Triggers>
                                    </Style>
                                </Ellipse.Style>
                            </Ellipse>
                            <TextBlock Text="SERVO" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="10" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </Border>
                </StackPanel>

                <!-- 좌측: 버튼 + 상태 텍스트 -->
                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" VerticalAlignment="Center">
                    <Button Content="연결" Width="60" Height="26" Margin="0,0,6,0"
                            Click="BtnConnect_Click" Background="#007ACC" Foreground="White"
                            BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="10"/>
                    <Button Content="해제" Width="60" Height="26" Margin="0,0,12,0"
                            Click="BtnDisconnect_Click" Background="#C62828" Foreground="White"
                            BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="10"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding ConnectionStatus}" VerticalAlignment="Center"
                               FontSize="12" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                </StackPanel>
            </DockPanel>
        </Border>

        <!-- 메인: 3컬럼 (입력 | 출력 | 서보+시스템) -->
        <Grid Grid.Row="1" Margin="2,2,2,0">
            <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="2"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="2"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
            </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

            <!-- ===== 입력 컬럼 ===== -->
            <Border Grid.Column="0" BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" Margin="1">
                <Grid>
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                    <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#1B3A1B" Padding="6,4">
                        <TextBlock Text="입력 (MW0100~0109)" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12" Foreground="#4CAF50"/>
                    </Border>
                    <ScrollViewer Grid.Row="1" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                        <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding InputWords}">
                            <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                                <DataTemplate>
                                    <Border Margin="2,2,2,0" Padding="4" Background="#252526"
                                            BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="0,0,0,1">
                                        <StackPanel>
                                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,2">
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                           Foreground="#569CD6" FontSize="10"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE" FontSize="10"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
                                                           FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="10"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                            </StackPanel>
                                            <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0"
                                                     IsReadOnly="False"
                                                     RowStyle="{StaticResource InputRowStyle}">
                                                <DataGrid.Columns>
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="20">
                                                        <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                            <DataTemplate>
                                                                <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10">
                                                                    <Ellipse.Style>
                                                                        <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
                                                                            <Style.Triggers>
                                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                                                                                </DataTrigger>
                                                                            </Style.Triggers>
                                                                        </Style>
                                                                    </Ellipse.Style>
                                                                </Ellipse>
                                                            </DataTemplate>
                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="30"
                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="80"
                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                                                                       Width="*" IsReadOnly="False">
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
                                                            <Style TargetType="TextBox">
                                                                <Setter Property="Background" Value="#3C3C3C"/>
                                                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFD700"/>
                                                                <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#007ACC"/>
                                                            </Style>
                                                        </DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
                                                    </DataGridTextColumn>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="30"
                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                </DataGrid.Columns>
                                            </DataGrid>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                    </Border>
                                </DataTemplate>
                            </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                        </ItemsControl>
                    </ScrollViewer>
                </Grid>
            </Border>

            <!-- 구분선1 -->
            <GridSplitter Grid.Column="1" Width="2" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                          Background="#3F3F46"/>

            <!-- ===== 출력 컬럼 ===== -->
            <Border Grid.Column="2" BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" Margin="1">
                <Grid>
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                    <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#3A2A0A" Padding="6,4">
                        <TextBlock Text="출력 (MW0200~0209)" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12" Foreground="#FF9800"/>
                    </Border>
                    <ScrollViewer Grid.Row="1" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                        <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding OutputWords}">
                            <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                                <DataTemplate>
                                    <Border Margin="2,2,2,0" Padding="4" Background="#252526"
                                            BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="0,0,0,1">
                                        <StackPanel>
                                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,2">
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                           Foreground="#CE9178" FontSize="10"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE" FontSize="10"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
                                                           FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="10"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                            </StackPanel>
                                            <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0"
                                                     IsReadOnly="False"
                                                     RowStyle="{StaticResource OutputRowStyle}">
                                                <DataGrid.Columns>
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="SET" Width="38">
                                                        <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                            <DataTemplate>
                                                                <Button Click="BtnOutputToggle_Click"
                                                                        Tag="{Binding}"
                                                                        CommandParameter="{Binding DataContext, RelativeSource={RelativeSource AncestorType=DataGrid}}"
                                                                        Height="18" Width="32"
                                                                        FontSize="9" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                                        BorderThickness="0" Cursor="Hand"
                                                                        Focusable="False">
                                                                    <Button.Style>
                                                                        <Style TargetType="Button">
                                                                            <Setter Property="Content" Value="OFF"/>
                                                                            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#444"/>
                                                                            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#999"/>
                                                                            <Style.Triggers>
                                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                    <Setter Property="Content" Value="ON"/>
                                                                                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#FF9800"/>
                                                                                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="White"/>
                                                                                </DataTrigger>
                                                                            </Style.Triggers>
                                                                        </Style>
                                                                    </Button.Style>
                                                                </Button>
                                                            </DataTemplate>
                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="20">
                                                        <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                            <DataTemplate>
                                                                <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10">
                                                                    <Ellipse.Style>
                                                                        <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
                                                                            <Style.Triggers>
                                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#FF9800"/>
                                                                                </DataTrigger>
                                                                            </Style.Triggers>
                                                                        </Style>
                                                                    </Ellipse.Style>
                                                                </Ellipse>
                                                            </DataTemplate>
                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="30"
                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="80"
                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                                                                       Width="*" IsReadOnly="False">
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
                                                            <Style TargetType="TextBox">
                                                                <Setter Property="Background" Value="#3C3C3C"/>
                                                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFD700"/>
                                                                <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#007ACC"/>
                                                            </Style>
                                                        </DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
                                                    </DataGridTextColumn>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="30"
                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                </DataGrid.Columns>
                                            </DataGrid>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                    </Border>
                                </DataTemplate>
                            </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                        </ItemsControl>
                    </ScrollViewer>
                </Grid>
            </Border>

            <!-- 구분선2 -->
            <GridSplitter Grid.Column="3" Width="2" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                          Background="#3F3F46"/>

            <!-- ===== 서보+시스템 컬럼 ===== -->
            <Border Grid.Column="4" BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" Margin="1">
                <Grid>
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                    <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#0A1A3A" Padding="6,4">
                        <TextBlock Text="서보 / 시스템" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12" Foreground="#2196F3"/>
                    </Border>
                    <ScrollViewer Grid.Row="1" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                        <StackPanel>
                            <!-- 서보 파라미터 값 표시 -->
                            <Border Margin="2,2,2,0" Padding="6" Background="#252526"
                                    BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="0,0,0,1">
                                <StackPanel>
                                    <TextBlock Text="서보 파라미터/상태값" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="11"
                                               Foreground="#DCDCAA" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                                    <UniformGrid Columns="2" Rows="4">
                                        <StackPanel Margin="2">
                                            <TextBlock Text="목표 위치" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding TargetPos}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                       FontSize="14" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <StackPanel Margin="2">
                                            <TextBlock Text="목표 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding TargetVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                       FontSize="14" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <StackPanel Margin="2">
                                            <TextBlock Text="현재 위치 (raw)" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPos}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                       FontSize="14" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <StackPanel Margin="2">
                                            <TextBlock Text="현재 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                       FontSize="14" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <StackPanel Margin="2">
                                            <TextBlock Text="현재 위치 (도)" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPosDeg}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                       FontSize="14" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <StackPanel Margin="2">
                                            <TextBlock Text="조그 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding JogVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                       FontSize="14" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <StackPanel Margin="2">
                                            <TextBlock Text="에러 코드" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding ErrCode}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                       FontSize="14" Foreground="#F44747"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                    </UniformGrid>
                                </StackPanel>
                            </Border>

                            <!-- 서보/시스템 비트 목록 -->
                            <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding ServoSystemWords}">
                                <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                                    <DataTemplate>
                                        <Border Margin="2,2,2,0" Padding="4" Background="#252526"
                                                BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="0,0,0,1">
                                            <StackPanel>
                                                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,2">
                                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                               Foreground="#DCDCAA" FontSize="10"/>
                                                    <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE" FontSize="10"/>
                                                    <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding Direction}" Foreground="#C586C0" FontSize="10"/>
                                                    <TextBlock Text="] [" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
                                                               FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="10"/>
                                                    <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                                </StackPanel>
                                                <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0"
                                                         IsReadOnly="False"
                                                         RowStyle="{StaticResource ServoRowStyle}">
                                                    <DataGrid.Columns>
                                                        <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="20">
                                                            <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                                <DataTemplate>
                                                                    <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10">
                                                                        <Ellipse.Style>
                                                                            <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                                                                <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
                                                                                <Style.Triggers>
                                                                                    <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                        <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#2196F3"/>
                                                                                    </DataTrigger>
                                                                                </Style.Triggers>
                                                                            </Style>
                                                                        </Ellipse.Style>
                                                                    </Ellipse>
                                                                </DataTemplate>
                                                            </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="30"
                                                                           IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="80"
                                                                           IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                                                                           Width="*" IsReadOnly="False">
                                                            <DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
                                                                <Style TargetType="TextBox">
                                                                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#3C3C3C"/>
                                                                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFD700"/>
                                                                    <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#007ACC"/>
                                                                </Style>
                                                            </DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
                                                        </DataGridTextColumn>
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="30"
                                                                           IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                    </DataGrid.Columns>
                                                </DataGrid>
                                            </StackPanel>
                                        </Border>
                                    </DataTemplate>
                                </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                            </ItemsControl>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </ScrollViewer>
                </Grid>
            </Border>
        </Grid>

# Screenshot Check Agent

## Task Settings
- subagent_type: screenshot-viewer
- model: sonnet

## Role
Finds the latest screenshot from the `C:\Users\Administrator\Pictures\Screenshots` folder, reads it, and analyzes the content to report.

## Actions

1. Find the 1 most recent file in `C:\Users\Administrator\Pictures\Screenshots` folder (by modified time)
2. Read the image file using Read tool
3. Analyze the screenshot content and report to the user

## Analysis Items
- Summarize visible content on screen
- Highlight any error/warning messages
- Explain related context if code is visible
- Identify UI elements

## Rules
- If no file found, report "No screenshot found"
- After analysis, advise "Let me know if any further action is needed"

---

## 스크린샷 분석 (최신: 2026-03-18 10:27:11)

### 화면 내용 요약

**서보 / 시스템** 모니터링 화면으로, AssembleMonitor 프로젝트의 서보 파라미터/상태값 표시 패널입니다.

### 문제점 - "처리가 안 돼서 표시가 안 되는" 부분

**상단 서보 파라미터/상태값 섹션에서 값이 모두 `0`으로 표시됩니다:**

| 항목 | 표시값 |
|------|--------|
| 목표 위치 | 0 |
| 현재 위치 (raw) | 0 |
| 현재 위치 (도) | 0 |
| 에러 코드 | 0 |
| 목표 속도 | 0 |
| 현재 속도 | 0 |
| 조그 속도 | 0 |

값이 0인 것은 두 가지 가능성이 있습니다.

1. **PLC 통신이 연결되지 않은 상태** - MW0300~MW0400 워드 값이 실제로 읽히지 않아 0으로 표시됨
2. **서보 연결 미완료** - 서보가 HOME 복귀 전 상태라 위치값 자체가 0

### 비트 테이블 상태

- **MW0300 서보 명령 비트 [WRITE]**: `0x0000` - CMD_HOME, CMD_MOVE, CMD_STOP, CMD_RESET 모두 OFF
- **MW0301 서보 제어 부가 비트 [WRITE]**: `0x0000` - MOVE_REL(0=절대, 1=상대) 포함 전체 OFF
- **MW0400 서보 상태 비트 [READ]**: `0x0050` - STS_MOVING/STS_ERROR 등 읽히는 중 (하단 잘림)

MW0400이 `0x0050`으로 0이 아닌 값이 읽히고 있으므로, **PLC 통신 자체는 연결된 상태**입니다.

### 결론

값이 0으로 보이는 것은 처리 미완료가 아니라 **서보가 아직 HOME 복귀를 안 한 상태**이거나, **위치값 매핑 워드 주소가 아직 Read 처리에 포함되지 않은 것**일 가능성이 높습니다. 목표 위치/현재 위치를 읽어오는 워드 주소(MW 몇 번인지)가 폴링 대상에 포함되어 있는지 코드에서 확인이 필요합니다.

어느 값이 안 나오는지 구체적으로 말씀해 주시면 해당 코드를 바로 찾아드리겠습니다.

### 문제점 - "처리가 안 돼서 표시가 안 되는" 부분

**상단 서보 파라미터/상태값 섹션에서 값이 모두 `0`으로 표시됩니다:**

| 항목 | 표시값 |
|------|--------|
| 목표 위치 | 0 |
| 현재 위치 (raw) | 0 |

값이 0인 것은 두 가지 가능성이 있습니다.

1. **PLC 통신이 연결되지 않은 상태** - MW0300~MW0400 워드 값이 실제로 읽히지 않아 0으로 표시됨
2. **서보 연결 미완료** - 서보가 HOME 복귀 전 상태라 위치값 자체가 0

### 비트 테이블 상태

- **MW0300 서보 명령 비트 [WRITE]**: `0x0000` - CMD_HOME, CMD_MOVE, CMD_STOP, CMD_RESET 모두 OFF
- **MW0301 서보 제어 부가 비트 [WRITE]**: `0x0000` - MOVE_REL(0=절대, 1=상대) 포함 전체 OFF
- **MW0400 서보 상태 비트 [READ]**: `0x0050` - STS_MOVING/STS_ERROR 등 읽히는 중 (하단 잘림)

MW0400이 `0x0050`으로 0이 아닌 값이 읽히고 있으므로, **PLC 통신 자체는 연결된 상태**입니다.

### 결론

값이 0으로 보이는 것은 처리 미완료가 아니라 **서보가 아직 HOME 복귀를 안 한 상태**이거나, **위치값 매핑 워드 주소가 아직 Read 처리에 포함되지 않은 것**일 가능성이 높습니다. 목표 위치/현재 위치를 읽어오는 워드 주소(MW 몇 번인지)가 폴링 대상에 포함되어 있는지 코드에서 확인이 필요합니다.

어느 값이 안 나오는지 구체적으로 말씀해 주시면 해당 코드를 바로 찾아드리겠습니다.

스크린샷 확인했습니다.

**문제가 아닙니다** — MW0400이 `0x0050`으로 읽히고 있으니 통신은 정상입니다. 서보 파라미터 값이 전부 0인 건:

1. **서보가 아직 HOME 안 한 상태** → 위치/속도 값 자체가 0
2. **MW310~319에 목표값을 아직 안 썼으니** 목표 위치/속도도 0

`0x0050` = bit4(STS_RDY) + bit6(STS_SERVO_MC) ON → 위치결정모듈 준비됨 + 서보MC ON 상태. 정상입니다.

질문이 **"SET 버튼이 안 보인다"**는 뜻이었나요? MW0300, MW0301은 WRITE 영역이라 SET 버튼이 보여야 하는데, 스크린샷에서 SET 컬럼이 보이는지 확인해주세요. 혹시 안 보이면 빌드 후 재실행이 필요할 수 있습니다.

현재 상태 기준으로 정리하면:

## MW0300 SET 버튼으로 시도 가능한 명령

| 비트 | 이름 | 용도 |
|------|------|------|
| bit0 | CMD_HOME | 원점복귀 실행 |
| bit1 | CMD_MOVE | 위치이동 (MW310~313에 목표값 먼저 세팅 필요) |
| bit4 | CMD_STOP | 즉시정지 |
| bit5 | CMD_RESET | 서보 폴트 리셋 |

## 하지만 출력(MW200~209)은 강제로 못 살림

PLC `PROG_SAFETY`가 매 스캔 SafetyStop 조건 체크 → 출력 전체 0 클리어하는 구조:

- **s_EMO_Active=1** → EMO NC접점 미배선 → 항상 활성 → **하드웨어 문제**
- **s_WD_Timeout** → PC 하트비트가 잘 가고 있으면 이건 해결됨

**EMO 미배선이 근본 원인**이라 PC 쪽에서는 해결 불가입니다. PLC 담당하는 다른 클로드한테:

1. `PROG_SAFETY`에서 **EMO 체크를 임시 주석** 처리하거나
2. **EMO NC접점을 물리적으로 배선** (점퍼라도)

이 중 하나를 요청해야 출력 토글이 동작합니다. 서보 명령(MW300)은 SafetyStop과 별개로 PLC가 처리하니까, CMD_HOME이나 CMD_RESET은 SET 버튼으로 시도해볼 수 있습니다.

message.content: 그게 아니라 코드에서 프로그램 시작시 강제로 살리는 신호가 있는지

content.text: 현재 C# 코드에서 프로그램 시작 시 강제로 살리는 신호는 **하트비트(MW500) + PC_READY(bit8) 뿐**입니다.

이게 전부입니다. 연결 후 매 사이클:
- `MW500` bit0~7: 하트비트 카운터 (0~255 순환)
- `MW500` bit8: PC_READY = 1

**PLC 쪽에서 SafetyStop 해제 조건**은:
1. WD 타임아웃 아님 (하트비트 변화 감지) ← PC가 보내고 있음
2. EMO 비활성 ← **미배선이라 항상 활성**

즉, PC 코드에서 아무리 신호를 보내도 EMO 하드웨어 문제는 해결 안 됩니다. PLC 쪽에서 EMO 체크를 주석 처리해달라고 요청하세요.

네 맞습니다.

- `ReadWordsAsync("%MW410", 6)` → servoValues[0]~[5] = MW410~MW415
- `servoValues[4]` = **MW414** = `ErrCode`

에러코드 221은 PLC `PROG_SERVO`에서 APM FB들의 STAT 값을 OR한 결과입니다. PLC 담당한테 221이 어떤 APM 에러인지 확인 요청하세요 — LS XEC 위치결정 매뉴얼에 에러코드 테이블이 있을 겁니다.

message.content:
---
  서보 제어 패널 구현 요청

  현재 상태

  - PLC 통신 정상 (I/O 모니터 동작 확인)
  - 서보 원점복귀 완료
  - 이동 테스트 필요 — MW310~313 파라미터 입력 UI 필요

  필요 기능

  1. 서보 상태 표시 (READ)
  - MW400 비트별 상태: MOVING, ERROR, RDY, SERVO_MC
  - MW401 비트별 응답: HOME_DONE, MOVE_DONE, HOME_ERR, MOVE_ERR, RESET_DONE
  - MW410~411: 현재 위치 (DINT = MW410 + MW411×65536)
  - MW412~413: 현재 속도 (DINT)
  - MW414: 에러 코드

  2. 서보 파라미터 입력 (WRITE)
  - 목표 위치 입력 → MW310(하위) + MW311(상위) — DINT 분할
  - 목표 속도 입력 → MW312(하위) + MW313(상위) — DINT 분할
  - MW301.1 체크박스: 절대(0)/상대(1) 선택

  3. 명령 버튼 (MW300 비트 토글)
  - 원점복귀 (MW300.0) — ON→완료대기→OFF
  - 이동 (MW300.1) — 파라미터 세팅 후 ON
  - 정지 (MW300.4)
  - 에러 리셋 (MW300.5)

  4. JOG 버튼 (%UW0.9.1 직접 쓰기)
  - CW 조그 (bit0) — 누르는 동안 ON, 떼면 OFF
  - CCW 조그 (bit1) — 누르는 동안 ON, 떼면 OFF

  주의사항

  - DINT 분할: MW하위 = value & 0xFFFF, MW상위 = (value >> 16) & 0xFFFF

<Window x:Class="AssembleMonitor.Features.ServoTest.ServoTestWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        Title="서보 테스트" Width="500" Height="520"
        Background="#1E1E1E" WindowStartupLocation="CenterScreen"
        Closed="Window_Closed">
    <Window.Resources>
        <Style TargetType="Button">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#333"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="White"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="Height" Value="40"/>
            <Setter Property="Margin" Value="4"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#555"/>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="TextBlock">
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#DDD"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="13"/>
            <Setter Property="Margin" Value="4"/>
        </Style>
    </Window.Resources>

    <StackPanel Margin="12">
        <!-- 연결 -->
        <GroupBox Header="연결" Foreground="#AAA" BorderBrush="#555" Margin="0,0,0,8">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="4">
                <TextBlock Text="IP:" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                <TextBox x:Name="tbIp" Text="192.168.0.50" Width="130" Margin="4"
                         Background="#2A2A2A" Foreground="White" BorderBrush="#555"/>
                <Button x:Name="btnConnect" Content="연결" Width="80" Click="BtnConnect_Click"/>
                <TextBlock x:Name="tbStatus" Text="미연결" VerticalAlignment="Center"
                           Foreground="OrangeRed" FontWeight="Bold" Margin="8,0"/>
            </StackPanel>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 서보 MC -->
        <GroupBox Header="서보 MC  (%QX0.0.5)" Foreground="#AAA" BorderBrush="#555" Margin="0,0,0,8">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="4">
                <Button x:Name="btnServoOn" Content="서보 ON" Width="120"
                        Background="#1B5E20" Click="BtnServoOn_Click"/>
                <Button x:Name="btnServoOff" Content="서보 OFF" Width="120"
                        Background="#B71C1C" Click="BtnServoOff_Click"/>
                <TextBlock x:Name="tbServoState" Text="OFF" VerticalAlignment="Center"
                           FontSize="16" FontWeight="Bold" Margin="12,0"/>
            </StackPanel>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- JOG -->
        <GroupBox Header="JOG  (%UX0.9.16/17)" Foreground="#AAA" BorderBrush="#555" Margin="0,0,0,8">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="4">
                <Button x:Name="btnJogCW" Content="JOG CW (정방향)" Width="160"
                        PreviewMouseLeftButtonDown="BtnJogCW_Down"
                        PreviewMouseLeftButtonUp="BtnJogCW_Up"/>
                <Button x:Name="btnJogCCW" Content="JOG CCW (역방향)" Width="160"
                        PreviewMouseLeftButtonDown="BtnJogCCW_Down"
                        PreviewMouseLeftButtonUp="BtnJogCCW_Up"/>
            </StackPanel>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 입력 상태 -->
        <GroupBox Header="입력 상태  (%IW0.0.0)" Foreground="#AAA" BorderBrush="#555" Margin="0,0,0,8">
            <WrapPanel Margin="4">
                <TextBlock x:Name="tbIn00" Text="IN00:0" Width="70" FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                <TextBlock x:Name="tbIn01" Text="IN01:0" Width="70" FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                <TextBlock x:Name="tbIn05" Text="IN05:0" Width="70" FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                <TextBlock x:Name="tbIn11" Text="IN11:0" Width="70" FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                <TextBlock x:Name="tbIn13" Text="IN13:0" Width="70" FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                <TextBlock x:Name="tbIn15" Text="IN15:0" Width="70" FontFamily="Consolas"/>
            </WrapPanel>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 위치결정 모듈 상태 -->
        <GroupBox Header="위치결정 모듈  (%UW0.9.0)" Foreground="#AAA" BorderBrush="#555" Margin="0,0,0,8">
            <WrapPanel Margin="4">
                <TextBlock x:Name="tbRdy" Text="RDY:0" Width="70" FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                <TextBlock x:Name="tbJogCW" Text="JCW:0" Width="70" FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                <TextBlock x:Name="tbJogCCW" Text="JCCW:0" Width="70" FontFamily="Consolas"/>
            </WrapPanel>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 로그 -->
        <TextBox x:Name="tbLog" Height="100" IsReadOnly="True"
                 Background="#111" Foreground="#0F0" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="11"
                 VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto" TextWrapping="Wrap" Margin="0,4"/>
    </StackPanel>
</Window>

<Window x:Class="AssembleMonitor.MainWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        Title="1CELL Assemble Machine" Height="600" Width="900"
        Background="#1E1E1E" Foreground="#E0E0E0"
        WindowStartupLocation="CenterScreen">
    <Grid>
        <StackPanel VerticalAlignment="Center" HorizontalAlignment="Center">
            <TextBlock Text="1CELL Assemble Machine" FontSize="28" FontWeight="Bold"
                       Foreground="#569CD6" HorizontalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,0,8"/>
            <TextBlock Text="PC-Based Control Monitor" FontSize="16"
                       Foreground="#808080" HorizontalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,0,40"/>

            <Button Content="I/O 모니터 열기" Width="240" Height="50" FontSize="18"
                    FontWeight="Bold" Background="#007ACC" Foreground="White"
                    BorderThickness="0" Click="BtnIoMonitor_Click" Cursor="Hand">
                <Button.Style>
                    <Style TargetType="Button">
                        <Setter Property="Template">
                            <Setter.Value>
                                <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
                                    <Border x:Name="Bd" Background="{TemplateBinding Background}"
                                            CornerRadius="6" Padding="10">
                                        <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                                    </Border>
                                    <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                                        <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
                                            <Setter TargetName="Bd" Property="Background" Value="#1A8CD8"/>
                                        </Trigger>
                                        <Trigger Property="IsPressed" Value="True">
                                            <Setter TargetName="Bd" Property="Background" Value="#005A9E"/>
                                        </Trigger>
                                    </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                                </ControlTemplate>
                            </Setter.Value>
                        </Setter>
                    </Style>
                </Button.Style>
            </Button>
        </StackPanel>
    </Grid>
</Window>

<Window x:Class="AssembleMonitor.Features.ServoTest.ServoTestWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        Title="서보 제어 패널 — 1CELL Assemble" Width="600" Height="700"
        Background="#1E1E1E" Foreground="#E0E0E0"
        WindowStartupLocation="CenterScreen">

    <Window.Resources>
        <BooleanToVisibilityConverter x:Key="BoolToVis"/>
        <!-- LED 스타일 (ON=색상, OFF=회색) -->
        <Style x:Key="LedOn" TargetType="Ellipse">
            <Setter Property="Width" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="Height" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="GroupBox">
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#AAA"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="Margin" Value="0,0,0,6"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="6,4"/>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="TextBlock">
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="12"/>
            <Setter Property="VerticalAlignment" Value="Center"/>
        </Style>
    </Window.Resources>

    <Grid Margin="10">
        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
        </Grid.RowDefinitions>

        <!-- 0: 연결 -->
        <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#333337" Padding="8,4" Margin="0,0,0,6" CornerRadius="4">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                <Button Content="연결" Width="60" Height="28" Margin="0,0,6,0"
                        Click="BtnConnect_Click" Background="#007ACC" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                <Button Content="해제" Width="60" Height="28" Margin="0,0,12,0"
                        Click="BtnDisconnect_Click" Background="#C62828" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                <TextBlock Text="{Binding ConnStatus}" FontWeight="SemiBold" FontSize="13"/>
                <TextBlock Text="{Binding CycleMs, StringFormat=' ({0}ms)'}" Foreground="#808080" Margin="4,0"/>
            </StackPanel>
        </Border>

        <!-- 1: 서보 상태 LED -->
        <GroupBox Grid.Row="1" Header="서보 상태 (MW400/401)">
            <Grid>
                <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

                <!-- MW400 상태 비트 -->
                <StackPanel Grid.Column="0">
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding Mw400Hex}" Foreground="#808080" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="10" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Fill="{Binding StsMoving, Converter={x:Null}}" Margin="0,0,4,0"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="MOVING" FontSize="11"/>
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Fill="#555" Margin="12,0,4,0"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="ERROR" FontSize="11" Foreground="#F44336"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Fill="#555" Margin="0,0,4,0"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="RDY" FontSize="11"/>
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Fill="#555" Margin="12,0,4,0"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="SERVO_MC" FontSize="11"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </StackPanel>

                <!-- MW401 응답 비트 -->
                <StackPanel Grid.Column="1">
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding Mw401Hex}" Foreground="#808080" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="10" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Fill="#555" Margin="0,0,4,0"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="HOME_DONE" FontSize="11"/>
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Fill="#555" Margin="8,0,4,0"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="MOVE_DONE" FontSize="11"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Fill="#555" Margin="0,0,4,0"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="HOME_ERR" FontSize="11" Foreground="#F44336"/>
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Fill="#555" Margin="8,0,4,0"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="MOVE_ERR" FontSize="11" Foreground="#F44336"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Fill="#555" Margin="0,0,4,0"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="RESET_DONE" FontSize="11"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </StackPanel>
            </Grid>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 2: 현재값 표시 -->
        <GroupBox Grid.Row="2" Header="현재값 (MW410~414)">
            <UniformGrid Columns="4">
                <StackPanel Margin="2">
                    <TextBlock Text="현재 위치" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPos}" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="18" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                </StackPanel>
                <StackPanel Margin="2">
                    <TextBlock Text="위치 (도)" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPosDeg}" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="18" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                </StackPanel>
                <StackPanel Margin="2">
                    <TextBlock Text="현재 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActVel}" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="18" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                </StackPanel>
                <StackPanel Margin="2">
                    <TextBlock Text="에러 코드" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding ErrCode}" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="18" Foreground="#F44747"/>
                </StackPanel>
            </UniformGrid>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 3: 파라미터 입력 -->
        <GroupBox Grid.Row="3" Header="파라미터 (MW310~313, MW301)">
            <Grid>
                <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                <TextBlock Grid.Column="0" Text="목표위치:" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>
                <TextBox Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding TargetPosText, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                         Background="#2A2A2A" Foreground="#4FC1FF" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="14"
                         BorderBrush="#555" Padding="4,2" VerticalContentAlignment="Center"/>
                <TextBlock Grid.Column="2" Text="  속도:" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>
                <TextBox Grid.Column="3" Text="{Binding TargetVelText, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                         Background="#2A2A2A" Foreground="#B5CEA8" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="14"
                         BorderBrush="#555" Padding="4,2" VerticalContentAlignment="Center"/>
                <CheckBox Grid.Column="4" Content="상대이동" IsChecked="{Binding IsMoveRel}"
                          Foreground="#E0E0E0" Margin="8,0,0,0" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
            </Grid>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 4: 명령 버튼 -->
        <GroupBox Grid.Row="4" Header="명령 (MW300)">
            <Grid>
                <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                <Button Grid.Column="0" Content="원점복귀" Height="36" Margin="2"
                        Click="BtnHome_Click" Background="#1B5E20" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12"/>
                <Button Grid.Column="1" Content="이동" Height="36" Margin="2"
                        Click="BtnMove_Click" Background="#0D47A1" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12"/>
                <Button Grid.Column="2" Content="정지" Height="36" Margin="2"
                        Click="BtnStop_Click" Background="#C62828" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12"/>
                <Button Grid.Column="3" Content="리셋" Height="36" Margin="2"
                        Click="BtnReset_Click" Background="#E65100" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12"/>
                <Button Grid.Column="4" Content="클리어" Height="36" Margin="2"
                        Click="BtnClear_Click" Background="#444" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontSize="12" ToolTip="MW300=0 전체 OFF"/>
            </Grid>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 5: JOG 버튼 -->
        <GroupBox Grid.Row="5" Header="JOG (%UW0.9.1) — 누르는 동안 동작">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                <Button Content="◀ CCW (역방향)" Width="180" Height="44" Margin="4"
                        Background="#37474F" Foreground="White" BorderThickness="0"
                        FontSize="14" FontWeight="Bold"
                        PreviewMouseLeftButtonDown="BtnJogCcw_Down"
                        PreviewMouseLeftButtonUp="BtnJogCcw_Up"/>
                <Button Content="CW (정방향) ▶" Width="180" Height="44" Margin="4"
                        Background="#37474F" Foreground="White" BorderThickness="0"
                        FontSize="14" FontWeight="Bold"
                        PreviewMouseLeftButtonDown="BtnJogCw_Down"
                        PreviewMouseLeftButtonUp="BtnJogCw_Up"/>
            </StackPanel>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 6: 마지막 명령 표시 -->
        <Border Grid.Row="6" Background="#007ACC" Padding="6,3" VerticalAlignment="Bottom" CornerRadius="0,0,4,4">
            <TextBlock Text="{Binding LastCmd}" Foreground="White" FontSize="11"/>
        </Border>
    </Grid>
</Window>
