<Window x:Class="AssembleMonitor.Features.ServoTest.ServoTestWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        Title="서보 제어 패널 — 1CELL Assemble" Width="600" Height="700"
        Background="#1E1E1E" Foreground="#E0E0E0"
        WindowStartupLocation="CenterScreen">

    <Window.Resources>
        <BooleanToVisibilityConverter x:Key="BoolToVis"/>
        <!-- LED 스타일 (ON=색상, OFF=회색) -->
        <Style x:Key="LedOn" TargetType="Ellipse">
            <Setter Property="Width" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="Height" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="GroupBox">
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#AAA"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="Margin" Value="0,0,0,6"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="6,4"/>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="TextBlock">
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="12"/>
            <Setter Property="VerticalAlignment" Value="Center"/>
        </Style>
    </Window.Resources>

    <Grid Margin="10">
        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
        </Grid.RowDefinitions>

        <!-- 0: 연결 -->
        <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#333337" Padding="8,4" Margin="0,0,0,6" CornerRadius="4">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                <Button Content="연결" Width="60" Height="28" Margin="0,0,6,0"
                        Click="BtnConnect_Click" Background="#007ACC" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                <Button Content="해제" Width="60" Height="28" Margin="0,0,12,0"
                        Click="BtnDisconnect_Click" Background="#C62828" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                <TextBlock Text="{Binding ConnStatus}" FontWeight="SemiBold" FontSize="13"/>
                <TextBlock Text="{Binding CycleMs, StringFormat=' ({0}ms)'}" Foreground="#808080" Margin="4,0"/>
            </StackPanel>
        </Border>

        <!-- 1: 서보 상태 LED -->
        <GroupBox Grid.Row="1" Header="서보 상태 (MW400/401)">
            <Grid>
                <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

                <!-- MW400 상태 비트 -->
                <StackPanel Grid.Column="0">
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding Mw400Hex}" Foreground="#808080" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="10" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Fill="{Binding StsMoving, Converter={x:Null}}" Margin="0,0,4,0"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="MOVING" FontSize="11"/>
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Fill="#555" Margin="12,0,4,0"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="ERROR" FontSize="11" Foreground="#F44336"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Fill="#555" Margin="0,0,4,0"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="RDY" FontSize="11"/>
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Fill="#555" Margin="12,0,4,0"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="SERVO_MC" FontSize="11"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </StackPanel>

                <!-- MW401 응답 비트 -->
                <StackPanel Grid.Column="1">
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding Mw401Hex}" Foreground="#808080" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="10" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Fill="#555" Margin="0,0,4,0"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="HOME_DONE" FontSize="11"/>
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Fill="#555" Margin="8,0,4,0"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="MOVE_DONE" FontSize="11"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Fill="#555" Margin="0,0,4,0"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="HOME_ERR" FontSize="11" Foreground="#F44336"/>
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Fill="#555" Margin="8,0,4,0"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="MOVE_ERR" FontSize="11" Foreground="#F44336"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Fill="#555" Margin="0,0,4,0"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="RESET_DONE" FontSize="11"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </StackPanel>
            </Grid>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 2: 현재값 표시 -->
        <GroupBox Grid.Row="2" Header="현재값 (MW410~414)">
            <UniformGrid Columns="4">
                <StackPanel Margin="2">
                    <TextBlock Text="현재 위치" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPos}" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="18" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                </StackPanel>
                <StackPanel Margin="2">
                    <TextBlock Text="위치 (도)" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPosDeg}" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="18" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                </StackPanel>
                <StackPanel Margin="2">
                    <TextBlock Text="현재 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActVel}" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="18" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                </StackPanel>
                <StackPanel Margin="2">
                    <TextBlock Text="에러 코드" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding ErrCode}" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="18" Foreground="#F44747"/>
                </StackPanel>
            </UniformGrid>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 3: 파라미터 입력 -->
        <GroupBox Grid.Row="3" Header="파라미터 (MW310~313, MW301)">
            <Grid>
                <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                <TextBlock Grid.Column="0" Text="목표위치:" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>
                <TextBox Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding TargetPosText, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                         Background="#2A2A2A" Foreground="#4FC1FF" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="14"
                         BorderBrush="#555" Padding="4,2" VerticalContentAlignment="Center"/>
                <TextBlock Grid.Column="2" Text="  속도:" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>
                <TextBox Grid.Column="3" Text="{Binding TargetVelText, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                         Background="#2A2A2A" Foreground="#B5CEA8" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="14"
                         BorderBrush="#555" Padding="4,2" VerticalContentAlignment="Center"/>
                <CheckBox Grid.Column="4" Content="상대이동" IsChecked="{Binding IsMoveRel}"
                          Foreground="#E0E0E0" Margin="8,0,0,0" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
            </Grid>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 4: 명령 버튼 -->
        <GroupBox Grid.Row="4" Header="명령 (MW300)">
            <Grid>
                <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                <Button Grid.Column="0" Content="원점복귀" Height="36" Margin="2"
                        Click="BtnHome_Click" Background="#1B5E20" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12"/>
                <Button Grid.Column="1" Content="이동" Height="36" Margin="2"
                        Click="BtnMove_Click" Background="#0D47A1" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12"/>
                <Button Grid.Column="2" Content="정지" Height="36" Margin="2"
                        Click="BtnStop_Click" Background="#C62828" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12"/>
                <Button Grid.Column="3" Content="리셋" Height="36" Margin="2"
                        Click="BtnReset_Click" Background="#E65100" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12"/>
                <Button Grid.Column="4" Content="클리어" Height="36" Margin="2"
                        Click="BtnClear_Click" Background="#444" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontSize="12" ToolTip="MW300=0 전체 OFF"/>
            </Grid>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 5: JOG 버튼 -->
        <GroupBox Grid.Row="5" Header="JOG (%UW0.9.1) — 누르는 동안 동작">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                <Button Content="◀ CCW (역방향)" Width="180" Height="44" Margin="4"
                        Background="#37474F" Foreground="White" BorderThickness="0"
                        FontSize="14" FontWeight="Bold"
                        PreviewMouseLeftButtonDown="BtnJogCcw_Down"
                        PreviewMouseLeftButtonUp="BtnJogCcw_Up"/>
                <Button Content="CW (정방향) ▶" Width="180" Height="44" Margin="4"
                        Background="#37474F" Foreground="White" BorderThickness="0"
                        FontSize="14" FontWeight="Bold"

                        PreviewMouseLeftButtonUp="BtnJogCw_Up"/>
            </StackPanel>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 6: 마지막 명령 표시 -->
        <Border Grid.Row="6" Background="#007ACC" Padding="6,3" VerticalAlignment="Bottom" CornerRadius="0,0,4,4">
            <TextBlock Text="{Binding LastCmd}" Foreground="White" FontSize="11"/>
        </Border>
    </Grid>
</Window>

toolUseResult.originalFile:
<Window x:Class="AssembleMonitor.Features.ServoTest.ServoTestWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        Title="서보 테스트" Width="500" Height="520"
        Background="#1E1E1E" WindowStartupLocation="CenterScreen"
        Closed="Window_Closed">
    <Window.Resources>
        <Style TargetType="Button">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#333"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="White"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="Height" Value="40"/>
            <Setter Property="Margin" Value="4"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#555"/>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="TextBlock">
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#DDD"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="13"/>
            <Setter Property="Margin" Value="4"/>
        </Style>
    </Window.Resources>

    <StackPanel Margin="12">
        <!-- 연결 -->
        <GroupBox Header="연결" Foreground="#AAA" BorderBrush="#555" Margin="0,0,0,8">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="4">
                <TextBlock Text="IP:" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                <TextBox x:Name="tbIp" Text="192.168.0.50" Width="130" Margin="4"
                         Background="#2A2A2A" Foreground="White" BorderBrush="#555"/>
                <Button x:Name="btnConnect" Content="연결" Width="80" Click="BtnConnect_Click"/>
                <TextBlock x:Name="tbStatus" Text="미연결" VerticalAlignment="Center"
                           Foreground="OrangeRed" FontWeight="Bold" Margin="8,0"/>
            </StackPanel>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 서보 MC -->
        <GroupBox Header="서보 MC  (%QX0.0.5)" Foreground="#AAA" BorderBrush="#555" Margin="0,0,0,8">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="4">
                <Button x:Name="btnServoOn" Content="서보 ON" Width="120"
                        Background="#1B5E20" Click="BtnServoOn_Click"/>
                <Button x:Name="btnServoOff" Content="서보 OFF" Width="120"
                        Background="#B71C1C" Click="BtnServoOff_Click"/>
                <TextBlock x:Name="tbServoState" Text="OFF" VerticalAlignment="Center"
                           FontSize="16" FontWeight="Bold" Margin="12,0"/>
            </StackPanel>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- JOG -->
        <GroupBox Header="JOG  (%UX0.9.16/17)" Foreground="#AAA" BorderBrush="#555" Margin="0,0,0,8">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="4">
                <Button x:Name="btnJogCW" Content="JOG CW (정방향)" Width="160"
                        PreviewMouseLeftButtonDown="BtnJogCW_Down"
                        PreviewMouseLeftButtonUp="BtnJogCW_Up"/>
                <Button x:Name="btnJogCCW" Content="JOG CCW (역방향)" Width="160"
                        PreviewMouseLeftButtonDown="BtnJogCCW_Down"
                        PreviewMouseLeftButtonUp="BtnJogCCW_Up"/>
            </StackPanel>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 입력 상태 -->
        <GroupBox Header="입력 상태  (%IW0.0.0)" Foreground="#AAA" BorderBrush="#555" Margin="0,0,0,8">
            <WrapPanel Margin="4">
                <TextBlock x:Name="tbIn00" Text="IN00:0" Width="70" FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                <TextBlock x:Name="tbIn01" Text="IN01:0" Width="70" FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                <TextBlock x:Name="tbIn05" Text="IN05:0" Width="70" FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                <TextBlock x:Name="tbIn11" Text="IN11:0" Width="70" FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                <TextBlock x:Name="tbIn13" Text="IN13:0" Width="70" FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                <TextBlock x:Name="tbIn15" Text="IN15:0" Width="70" FontFamily="Consolas"/>
            </WrapPanel>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 위치결정 모듈 상태 -->
        <GroupBox Header="위치결정 모듈  (%UW0.9.0)" Foreground="#AAA" BorderBrush="#555" Margin="0,0,0,8">
            <WrapPanel Margin="4">
                <TextBlock x:Name="tbRdy" Text="RDY:0" Width="70" FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                <TextBlock x:Name="tbJogCW" Text="JCW:0" Width="70" FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                <TextBlock x:Name="tbJogCCW" Text="JCCW:0" Width="70" FontFamily="Consolas"/>
            </WrapPanel>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 로그 -->
        <TextBox x:Name="tbLog" Height="100" IsReadOnly="True"
                 Background="#111" Foreground="#0F0" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="11"
                 VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto" TextWrapping="Wrap" Margin="0,4"/>
    </StackPanel>
</Window>

toolUseResult.originalFile:
<Window x:Class="AssembleMonitor.Features.ServoTest.ServoTestWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        Title="서보 제어 패널 — 1CELL Assemble" Width="600" Height="700"
        Background="#1E1E1E" Foreground="#E0E0E0"
        WindowStartupLocation="CenterScreen">

    <Window.Resources>
        <BooleanToVisibilityConverter x:Key="BoolToVis"/>
        <!-- LED 스타일 (ON=색상, OFF=회색) -->
        <Style x:Key="LedOn" TargetType="Ellipse">
            <Setter Property="Width" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="Height" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="GroupBox">
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#AAA"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="Margin" Value="0,0,0,6"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="6,4"/>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="TextBlock">
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="12"/>
            <Setter Property="VerticalAlignment" Value="Center"/>
        </Style>
    </Window.Resources>

    <Grid Margin="10">
        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
        </Grid.RowDefinitions>

        <!-- 0: 연결 -->
        <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#333337" Padding="8,4" Margin="0,0,0,6" CornerRadius="4">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                <Button Content="연결" Width="60" Height="28" Margin="0,0,6,0"
                        Click="BtnConnect_Click" Background="#007ACC" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                <Button Content="해제" Width="60" Height="28" Margin="0,0,12,0"
                        Click="BtnDisconnect_Click" Background="#C62828" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                <TextBlock Text="{Binding ConnStatus}" FontWeight="SemiBold" FontSize="13"/>
                <TextBlock Text="{Binding CycleMs, StringFormat=' ({0}ms)'}" Foreground="#808080" Margin="4,0"/>
            </StackPanel>
        </Border>

        <!-- 1: 서보 상태 LED -->
        <GroupBox Grid.Row="1" Header="서보 상태 (MW400/401)">
            <Grid>
                <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

                <!-- MW400 상태 비트 -->
                <StackPanel Grid.Column="0">
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding Mw400Hex}" Foreground="#808080" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="10" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Fill="{Binding StsMoving, Converter={x:Null}}" Margin="0,0,4,0"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="MOVING" FontSize="11"/>
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Fill="#555" Margin="12,0,4,0"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="ERROR" FontSize="11" Foreground="#F44336"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Fill="#555" Margin="0,0,4,0"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="RDY" FontSize="11"/>
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Fill="#555" Margin="12,0,4,0"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="SERVO_MC" FontSize="11"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </StackPanel>

                <!-- MW401 응답 비트 -->
                <StackPanel Grid.Column="1">
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding Mw401Hex}" Foreground="#808080" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="10" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Fill="#555" Margin="0,0,4,0"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="HOME_DONE" FontSize="11"/>
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Fill="#555" Margin="8,0,4,0"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="MOVE_DONE" FontSize="11"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Fill="#555" Margin="0,0,4,0"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="HOME_ERR" FontSize="11" Foreground="#F44336"/>
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Fill="#555" Margin="8,0,4,0"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="MOVE_ERR" FontSize="11" Foreground="#F44336"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Fill="#555" Margin="0,0,4,0"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="RESET_DONE" FontSize="11"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </StackPanel>
            </Grid>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 2: 현재값 표시 -->
        <GroupBox Grid.Row="2" Header="현재값 (MW410~414)">
            <UniformGrid Columns="4">
                <StackPanel Margin="2">
                    <TextBlock Text="현재 위치" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPos}" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="18" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                </StackPanel>
                <StackPanel Margin="2">
                    <TextBlock Text="위치 (도)" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPosDeg}" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="18" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                </StackPanel>
                <StackPanel Margin="2">
                    <TextBlock Text="현재 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActVel}" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="18" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                </StackPanel>
                <StackPanel Margin="2">
                    <TextBlock Text="에러 코드" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding ErrCode}" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="18" Foreground="#F44747"/>
                </StackPanel>
            </UniformGrid>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 3: 파라미터 입력 -->
        <GroupBox Grid.Row="3" Header="파라미터 (MW310~313, MW301)">
            <Grid>
                <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                <TextBlock Grid.Column="0" Text="목표위치:" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>
                <TextBox Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding TargetPosText, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                         Background="#2A2A2A" Foreground="#4FC1FF" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="14"
                         BorderBrush="#555" Padding="4,2" VerticalContentAlignment="Center"/>
                <TextBlock Grid.Column="2" Text="  속도:" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>
                <TextBox Grid.Column="3" Text="{Binding TargetVelText, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                         Background="#2A2A2A" Foreground="#B5CEA8" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="14"
                         BorderBrush="#555" Padding="4,2" VerticalContentAlignment="Center"/>
                <CheckBox Grid.Column="4" Content="상대이동" IsChecked="{Binding IsMoveRel}"
                          Foreground="#E0E0E0" Margin="8,0,0,0" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
            </Grid>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 4: 명령 버튼 -->
        <GroupBox Grid.Row="4" Header="명령 (MW300)">
            <Grid>
                <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                <Button Grid.Column="0" Content="원점복귀" Height="36" Margin="2"
                        Click="BtnHome_Click" Background="#1B5E20" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12"/>
                <Button Grid.Column="1" Content="이동" Height="36" Margin="2"
                        Click="BtnMove_Click" Background="#0D47A1" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12"/>
                <Button Grid.Column="2" Content="정지" Height="36" Margin="2"
                        Click="BtnStop_Click" Background="#C62828" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12"/>
                <Button Grid.Column="3" Content="리셋" Height="36" Margin="2"
                        Click="BtnReset_Click" Background="#E65100" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12"/>
                <Button Grid.Column="4" Content="클리어" Height="36" Margin="2"
                        Click="BtnClear_Click" Background="#444" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontSize="12" ToolTip="MW300=0 전체 OFF"/>
            </Grid>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 5: JOG 버튼 -->
        <GroupBox Grid.Row="5" Header="JOG (%UW0.9.1) — 누르는 동안 동작">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                <Button Content="◀ CCW (역방향)" Width="180" Height="44" Margin="4"
                        Background="#37474F" Foreground="White" BorderThickness="0"
                        FontSize="14" FontWeight="Bold"
                        PreviewMouseLeftButtonDown="BtnJogCcw_Down"
                        PreviewMouseLeftButtonUp="BtnJogCcw_Up"/>
                <Button Content="CW (정방향) ▶" Width="180" Height="44" Margin="4"
                        Background="#37474F" Foreground="White" BorderThickness="0"
                        FontSize="14" FontWeight="Bold"
                        PreviewMouseLeftButtonDown="BtnJogCw_Down"
                        PreviewMouseLeftButtonUp="BtnJogCw_Up"/>
            </StackPanel>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 6: 마지막 명령 표시 -->
        <Border Grid.Row="6" Background="#007ACC" Padding="6,3" VerticalAlignment="Bottom" CornerRadius="0,0,4,4">
            <TextBlock Text="{Binding LastCmd}" Foreground="White" FontSize="11"/>
        </Border>
    </Grid>
</Window>

content.text:
빌드 성공 (0 오류, 0 경고).

## 서보 제어 패널 구현 완료

### 파일 구조
- `Features/ServoTest/ServoControlViewModel.cs` — 서보 제어 로직 (폴링, 명령, JOG)
- `Features/ServoTest/ServoTestWindow.xaml` — UI (상태LED + 현재값 + 파라미터입력 + 명령버튼 + JOG)
- `Features/ServoTest/ServoTestWindow.xaml.cs` — 이벤트 핸들러

### 기능
| 영역 | 내용 |
|------|------|
| **상태 LED** | MW400: MOVING, ERROR, RDY, SERVO_MC / MW401: HOME_DONE, MOVE_DONE, HOME_ERR, MOVE_ERR, RESET_DONE |
| **현재값** | 위치(raw+도), 속도, 에러코드 — 100ms 폴링 |
| **파라미터** | 목표위치 + 속도 입력 → MW310~313 DINT 분할 쓰기, 절대/상대 체크박스(MW301.1) |
| **명령** | 원점복귀(bit0), 이동(bit1), 정지(bit4), 리셋(bit5), 클리어(MW300=0) |
| **JOG** | CW/CCW 버튼 — 누르는 동안 %UW0.9.1 bit0/1 ON, 떼면 OFF |

### 진입점
- MainWindow에 **"서보 제어 열기"** 버튼 추가 (녹색)
- 별도 XgtClient 사용 (I/O 모니터와 독립 연결)

content.text:
# Screenshot Check Agent

## Task Settings
- subagent_type: screenshot-viewer
- model: sonnet

## Role
Finds the latest screenshot from the `C:\Users\Administrator\Pictures\Screenshots` folder, reads it, and analyzes the content to report.

## Actions

1. Find the 1 most recent file in `C:\Users\Administrator\Pictures\Screenshots` folder (by modified time)
2. Read the image file using Read tool
3. Analyze the screenshot content and report to the user

## Analysis Items
- Summarize visible content on screen
- Highlight any error/warning messages
- Explain related context if code is visible
- Identify UI elements

## Rules
- If no file found, report "No screenshot found"
- After analysis, advise "Let me know if any further action is needed"


ARGUMENTS: 상단에 연결 해제 버튼 정렬 안됨 우측에 라벨은 제거 해줘 하단에 나오니

content.text:
스크린샷 분석 결과입니다.

**파일:** `C:/Users/Administrator/Pictures/Screenshots/스크린샷 2026-03-18 104456.png`

---

**화면 요약**

서보 제어 패널 (1CELL) WinForms 창입니다. PLC MW 레지스터를 직접 읽고 명령을 전송하는 서보 진단/조작 UI입니다.

**UI 구성 영역**

| 영역 | 내용 |
|---|---|
| 연결 상태 | 연결됨 (16ms), 해제 버튼 활성 |
| 서보 상태 (MW400/401) | RDY, SERVO_MC ON / HOME_DONE ON / MOVE_ERR 표시 중 |
| 현재값 (MW410~414) | 에러 코드 **221** 표시 (빨간색) |
| 파라미터 (MW310~313) | 목표위치: 0, 속도: 10000 |
| 명령 (MW300) | 원점복귀, 이동, 정지, 리셋, 클리어 버튼 |
| JOG (%UW0.9.1) | CCW/CW 버튼 |

---

**정렬 문제 분석 (명령 버튼 하단 영역)**

명령(MW300) 영역의 버튼 5개 정렬이 어긋나 있습니다.

- **원점복귀, 이동, 정지, 리셋** 4개 버튼: 좌측에 균등 배치되어 있음
- **클리어** 버튼: 동일 행 맨 우측에 위치하는데, 크기나 세로 위치가 나머지 4개와 미묘하게 맞지 않아 보임 (버튼 높이 혹은 Top 좌표 불일치 가능성)
- 전체적으로 버튼들이 `FlowLayoutPanel` 또는 수동 좌표 배치인 경우, 마지막 버튼이 줄바꿈되거나 Y축이 틀어지는 패턴임

**오류 정보**

- MOVE_ERR 상태 표시 ON
- 에러 코드 **221** (빨간색)

---

**수정 방향**

명령 버튼 5개의 코드를 확인해야 합니다. 어느 파일에 배치되어 있는지 찾겠습니까? 현재 프로젝트 경로 `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\1cellAssembleMachine\PLC_ST\c#\AssembleMonitor` 기준으로 서보 제어 패널 관련 파일을 찾아드릴 수 있습니다.

toolUseResult.originalFile:
<Window x:Class="AssembleMonitor.Features.ServoTest.ServoTestWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        Title="서보 제어 패널 — 1CELL Assemble" Width="600" Height="700"
        Background="#1E1E1E" Foreground="#E0E0E0"
        WindowStartupLocation="CenterScreen">

    <Window.Resources>
        <BooleanToVisibilityConverter x:Key="BoolToVis"/>
        <!-- LED 스타일 (ON=색상, OFF=회색) -->
        <Style x:Key="LedOn" TargetType="Ellipse">
            <Setter Property="Width" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="Height" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="GroupBox">
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#AAA"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="Margin" Value="0,0,0,6"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="6,4"/>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="TextBlock">
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="12"/>
            <Setter Property="VerticalAlignment" Value="Center"/>
        </Style>
    </Window.Resources>

    <Grid Margin="10">
        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
        </Grid.RowDefinitions>

        <!-- 0: 연결 -->
        <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#333337" Padding="8,4" Margin="0,0,0,6" CornerRadius="4">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                <Button Content="연결" Width="60" Height="28" Margin="0,0,6,0"
                        Click="BtnConnect_Click" Background="#007ACC" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                <Button Content="해제" Width="60" Height="28" Margin="0,0,12,0"
                        Click="BtnDisconnect_Click" Background="#C62828" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                <TextBlock Text="{Binding ConnStatus}" FontWeight="SemiBold" FontSize="13"/>
                <TextBlock Text="{Binding CycleMs, StringFormat=' ({0}ms)'}" Foreground="#808080" Margin="4,0"/>
            </StackPanel>
        </Border>

        <!-- 1: 서보 상태 LED -->
        <GroupBox Grid.Row="1" Header="서보 상태 (MW400/401)">
            <Grid>
                <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

                <!-- MW400 상태 비트 -->
                <StackPanel Grid.Column="0">
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding Mw400Hex}" Foreground="#808080" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="10" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding StsMoving}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="MOVING" FontSize="11" Margin="0,0,12,0"/>
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding StsError}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#F44336"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="ERROR" FontSize="11" Foreground="#F44336"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding StsRdy}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="RDY" FontSize="11" Margin="0,0,12,0"/>
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding StsServoMc}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#2196F3"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="SERVO_MC" FontSize="11"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </StackPanel>

                <!-- MW401 응답 비트 -->
                <StackPanel Grid.Column="1">
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding Mw401Hex}" Foreground="#808080" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="10" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding RspHomeDone}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="HOME_DONE" FontSize="11" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding RspMoveDone}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="MOVE_DONE" FontSize="11"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding RspHomeErr}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#F44336"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="HOME_ERR" FontSize="11" Foreground="#F44336" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding RspMoveErr}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#F44336"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="MOVE_ERR" FontSize="11" Foreground="#F44336"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding RspResetDone}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="RESET_DONE" FontSize="11"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </StackPanel>
            </Grid>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 2: 현재값 표시 -->
        <GroupBox Grid.Row="2" Header="현재값 (MW410~414)">
            <UniformGrid Columns="4">
                <StackPanel Margin="2">
                    <TextBlock Text="현재 위치" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPos}" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="18" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                </StackPanel>
                <StackPanel Margin="2">
                    <TextBlock Text="위치 (도)" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPosDeg}" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="18" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                </StackPanel>
                <StackPanel Margin="2">
                    <TextBlock Text="현재 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActVel}" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="18" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                </StackPanel>
                <StackPanel Margin="2">
                    <TextBlock Text="에러 코드" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding ErrCode}" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="18" Foreground="#F44747"/>
                </StackPanel>
            </UniformGrid>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 3: 파라미터 입력 -->
        <GroupBox Grid.Row="3" Header="파라미터 (MW310~313, MW301)">
            <Grid>
                <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                <TextBlock Grid.Column="0" Text="목표위치:" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>
                <TextBox Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding TargetPosText, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                         Background="#2A2A2A" Foreground="#4FC1FF" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="14"
                         BorderBrush="#555" Padding="4,2" VerticalContentAlignment="Center"/>
                <TextBlock Grid.Column="2" Text="  속도:" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>
                <TextBox Grid.Column="3" Text="{Binding TargetVelText, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                         Background="#2A2A2A" Foreground="#B5CEA8" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="14"
                         BorderBrush="#555" Padding="4,2" VerticalContentAlignment="Center"/>
                <CheckBox Grid.Column="4" Content="상대이동" IsChecked="{Binding IsMoveRel}"
                          Foreground="#E0E0E0" Margin="8,0,0,0" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
            </Grid>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 4: 명령 버튼 -->
        <GroupBox Grid.Row="4" Header="명령 (MW300)">
            <Grid>
                <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                <Button Grid.Column="0" Content="원점복귀" Height="36" Margin="2"
                        Click="BtnHome_Click" Background="#1B5E20" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12"/>
                <Button Grid.Column="1" Content="이동" Height="36" Margin="2"
                        Click="BtnMove_Click" Background="#0D47A1" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12"/>
                <Button Grid.Column="2" Content="정지" Height="36" Margin="2"
                        Click="BtnStop_Click" Background="#C62828" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12"/>
                <Button Grid.Column="3" Content="리셋" Height="36" Margin="2"
                        Click="BtnReset_Click" Background="#E65100" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12"/>
                <Button Grid.Column="4" Content="클리어" Height="36" Margin="2"
                        Click="BtnClear_Click" Background="#444" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontSize="12" ToolTip="MW300=0 전체 OFF"/>
            </Grid>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 5: JOG 버튼 -->
        <GroupBox Grid.Row="5" Header="JOG (%UW0.9.1) — 누르는 동안 동작">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                <Button Content="◀ CCW (역방향)" Width="180" Height="44" Margin="4"
                        Background="#37474F" Foreground="White" BorderThickness="0"
                        FontSize="14" FontWeight="Bold"
                        PreviewMouseLeftButtonDown="BtnJogCcw_Down"
                        PreviewMouseLeftButtonUp="BtnJogCcw_Up"/>
                <Button Content="CW (정방향) ▶" Width="180" Height="44" Margin="4"
                        Background="#37474F" Foreground="White" BorderThickness="0"
                        FontSize="14" FontWeight="Bold"
                        PreviewMouseLeftButtonDown="BtnJogCw_Down"
                        PreviewMouseLeftButtonUp="BtnJogCw_Up"/>
            </StackPanel>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 6: 마지막 명령 표시 -->
        <Border Grid.Row="6" Background="#007ACC" Padding="6,3" VerticalAlignment="Bottom" CornerRadius="0,0,4,4">
            <TextBlock Text="{Binding LastCmd}" Foreground="White" FontSize="11"/>
        </Border>
    </Grid>
</Window>

content.text: 빌드 성공. `SizeToContent="Height"` 추가해서 창 높이가 내부 콘텐츠에 맞게 자동 조절됩니다. 명령 버튼과 JOG 버튼이 잘리지 않고 전부 보일 겁니다. 재실행해서 확인해주세요.

# Screenshot Check Agent

## Task Settings
- subagent_type: screenshot-viewer
- model: sonnet

## Role
Finds the latest screenshot from the `C:\Users\Administrator\Pictures\Screenshots` folder, reads it, and analyzes the content to report.

## Actions

1. Find the 1 most recent file in `C:\Users\Administrator\Pictures\Screenshots` folder (by modified time)
2. Read the image file using Read tool
3. Analyze the screenshot content and report to the user

## Analysis Items
- Summarize visible content on screen
- Highlight any error/warning messages
- Explain related context if code is visible
- Identify UI elements

## Rules
- If no file found, report "No screenshot found"
- After analysis, advise "Let me know if any further action is needed"


ARGUMENTS: 버튼 하단 정렬 !

content.text:
이미지 분석 결과:

**파일:** `C:\Users\Administrator\Pictures\Screenshots\스크린샷 2026-03-18 104815.png`

**화면 내용:**
- "명령 (MW300)" 이라는 GroupBox/Panel 안에 5개의 명령 버튼이 가로로 나열되어 있음
- 버튼 목록: 원점복귀 (초록), 이동 (파랑), 정지 (빨강), 리셋 (주황), 클리어 (회색/비활성)

**버튼 정렬 문제 분석:**

1. **"클리어" 버튼이 다른 버튼보다 작음** - 다른 4개 버튼은 동일한 너비인데 "클리어"만 눈에 띄게 좁음 (또는 텍스트가 짤린 것처럼 보임)
2. **높이 불일치 가능성** - 자세히 보면 "클리어" 버튼이 다른 버튼들과 상하 여백이 다르게 느껴짐
3. **배경색 없음** - "클리어"만 회색 배경(비활성 상태)으로 다른 4개와 시각적으로 일관성이 떨어짐

**주요 문제:**
- `클리어` 버튼의 Width가 다른 버튼들과 다르게 설정되어 있을 가능성이 높음
- Designer에서 Anchor 또는 Dock 설정이 다른 버튼들과 다르거나, 수동으로 Size를 다르게 지정했을 가능성

**확인/수정 포인트:**
- 5개 버튼을 모두 선택 후 우클릭 > "Make Same Size" 적용
- 또는 코드에서 모든 버튼의 Width를 동일한 값으로 명시적으로 설정
- Anchor를 `Top, Left, Right`로 일관되게 설정하고 TableLayoutPanel 사용 권장

toolUseResult.prompt: Find the most recent screenshot in C:\Users\Administrator\Pictures\Screenshots folder, read it, and analyze the content. Focus on button alignment issues - the user says buttons at the bottom are not aligned properly.

content.text:
이미지 분석 결과:

**파일:** `C:\Users\Administrator\Pictures\Screenshots\스크린샷 2026-03-18 104815.png`

**화면 내용:**
- "명령 (MW300)" 이라는 GroupBox/Panel 안에 5개의 명령 버튼이 가로로 나열되어 있음
- 버튼 목록: 원점복귀 (초록), 이동 (파랑), 정지 (빨강), 리셋 (주황), 클리어 (회색/비활성)

**버튼 정렬 문제 분석:**

1. **"클리어" 버튼이 다른 버튼보다 작음** - 다른 4개 버튼은 동일한 너비인데 "클리어"만 눈에 띄게 좁음 (또는 텍스트가 짤린 것처럼 보임)
2. **높이 불일치 가능성** - 자세히 보면 "클리어" 버튼이 다른 버튼들과 상하 여백이 다르게 느껴짐
3. **배경색 없음** - "클리어"만 회색 배경(비활성 상태)으로 다른 4개와 시각적으로 일관성이 떨어짐

**주요 문제:**
- `클리어` 버튼의 Width가 다른 버튼들과 다르게 설정되어 있을 가능성이 높음
- Designer에서 Anchor 또는 Dock 설정이 다른 버튼들과 다르거나, 수동으로 Size를 다르게 지정했을 가능성

**확인/수정 포인트:**
- 5개 버튼을 모두 선택 후 우클릭 > "Make Same Size" 적용
- 또는 코드에서 모든 버튼의 Width를 동일한 값으로 명시적으로 설정
- Anchor를 `Top, Left, Right`로 일관되게 설정하고 TableLayoutPanel 사용 권장

해당 버튼들이 어느 Form/UserControl에 있는지 확인하면 코드를 바로 수정할 수 있습니다. 프로젝트 경로를 알려주시면 찾아드리겠습니다.
스크린샷 확인했습니다. 명령 버튼 5개의 하단 정렬(높이)이 안 맞는 문제입니다. Grid `ColumnDefinition Width="*"`로 균등 배분되어 있지만 버튼에 `VerticalAlignment`가 없어서 그럴 수 있습니다. 수정합니다.

toolUseResult.originalFile:
<Window x:Class="AssembleMonitor.Features.ServoTest.ServoTestWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        Title="서보 제어 패널 — 1CELL Assemble" Width="600" Height="780"
        Background="#1E1E1E" Foreground="#E0E0E0"
        WindowStartupLocation="CenterScreen" SizeToContent="Height">

    <Window.Resources>
        <BooleanToVisibilityConverter x:Key="BoolToVis"/>
        <!-- LED 스타일 (ON=색상, OFF=회색) -->
        <Style x:Key="LedOn" TargetType="Ellipse">
            <Setter Property="Width" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="Height" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="GroupBox">
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#AAA"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="Margin" Value="0,0,0,6"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="6,4"/>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="TextBlock">
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="12"/>
            <Setter Property="VerticalAlignment" Value="Center"/>
        </Style>
    </Window.Resources>

    <Grid Margin="10">
        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
        </Grid.RowDefinitions>

        <!-- 0: 연결 -->
        <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#333337" Padding="8,4" Margin="0,0,0,6" CornerRadius="4">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                <Button Content="연결" Width="60" Height="28" Margin="0,0,6,0"
                        Click="BtnConnect_Click" Background="#007ACC" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                <Button Content="해제" Width="60" Height="28" Margin="0,0,12,0"
                        Click="BtnDisconnect_Click" Background="#C62828" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                <TextBlock Text="{Binding ConnStatus}" FontWeight="SemiBold" FontSize="13"/>
                <TextBlock Text="{Binding CycleMs, StringFormat=' ({0}ms)'}" Foreground="#808080" Margin="4,0"/>
            </StackPanel>
        </Border>

        <!-- 1: 서보 상태 LED -->
        <GroupBox Grid.Row="1" Header="서보 상태 (MW400/401)">
            <Grid>
                <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

                <!-- MW400 상태 비트 -->
                <StackPanel Grid.Column="0">
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding Mw400Hex}" Foreground="#808080" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="10" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding StsMoving}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="MOVING" FontSize="11" Margin="0,0,12,0"/>
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding StsError}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#F44336"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="ERROR" FontSize="11" Foreground="#F44336"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding StsRdy}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="RDY" FontSize="11" Margin="0,0,12,0"/>
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding StsServoMc}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#2196F3"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="SERVO_MC" FontSize="11"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </StackPanel>

                <!-- MW401 응답 비트 -->
                <StackPanel Grid.Column="1">
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding Mw401Hex}" Foreground="#808080" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="10" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding RspHomeDone}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="HOME_DONE" FontSize="11" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding RspMoveDone}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="MOVE_DONE" FontSize="11"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding RspHomeErr}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#F44336"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="HOME_ERR" FontSize="11" Foreground="#F44336" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding RspMoveErr}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#F44336"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="MOVE_ERR" FontSize="11" Foreground="#F44336"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding RspResetDone}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="RESET_DONE" FontSize="11"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </StackPanel>
            </Grid>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 2: 현재값 표시 -->
        <GroupBox Grid.Row="2" Header="현재값 (MW410~414)">
            <UniformGrid Columns="4">
                <StackPanel Margin="2">
                    <TextBlock Text="현재 위치" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPos}" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="18" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                </StackPanel>
                <StackPanel Margin="2">
                    <TextBlock Text="위치 (도)" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPosDeg}" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="18" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                </StackPanel>
                <StackPanel Margin="2">
                    <TextBlock Text="현재 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActVel}" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="18" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                </StackPanel>
                <StackPanel Margin="2">
                    <TextBlock Text="에러 코드" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding ErrCode}" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="18" Foreground="#F44747"/>
                </StackPanel>
            </UniformGrid>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 3: 파라미터 입력 -->
        <GroupBox Grid.Row="3" Header="파라미터 (MW310~313, MW301)">
            <Grid>
                <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                <TextBlock Grid.Column="0" Text="목표위치:" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>
                <TextBox Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding TargetPosText, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                         Background="#2A2A2A" Foreground="#4FC1FF" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="14"
                         BorderBrush="#555" Padding="4,2" VerticalContentAlignment="Center"/>
                <TextBlock Grid.Column="2" Text="  속도:" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>
                <TextBox Grid.Column="3" Text="{Binding TargetVelText, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                         Background="#2A2A2A" Foreground="#B5CEA8" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="14"
                         BorderBrush="#555" Padding="4,2" VerticalContentAlignment="Center"/>
                <CheckBox Grid.Column="4" Content="상대이동" IsChecked="{Binding IsMoveRel}"
                          Foreground="#E0E0E0" Margin="8,0,0,0" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
            </Grid>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 4: 명령 버튼 -->
        <GroupBox Grid.Row="4" Header="명령 (MW300)">
            <Grid>
                <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                <Button Grid.Column="0" Content="원점복귀" Height="36" Margin="2"
                        Click="BtnHome_Click" Background="#1B5E20" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12"/>
                <Button Grid.Column="1" Content="이동" Height="36" Margin="2"
                        Click="BtnMove_Click" Background="#0D47A1" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12"/>
                <Button Grid.Column="2" Content="정지" Height="36" Margin="2"
                        Click="BtnStop_Click" Background="#C62828" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12"/>
                <Button Grid.Column="3" Content="리셋" Height="36" Margin="2"
                        Click="BtnReset_Click" Background="#E65100" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12"/>
                <Button Grid.Column="4" Content="클리어" Height="36" Margin="2"
                        Click="BtnClear_Click" Background="#444" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontSize="12" ToolTip="MW300=0 전체 OFF"/>
            </Grid>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 5: JOG 버튼 -->
        <GroupBox Grid.Row="5" Header="JOG (%UW0.9.1) — 누르는 동안 동작">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                <Button Content="◀ CCW (역방향)" Width="180" Height="44" Margin="4"
                        Background="#37474F" Foreground="White" BorderThickness="0"
                        FontSize="14" FontWeight="Bold"
                        PreviewMouseLeftButtonDown="BtnJogCcw_Down"
                        PreviewMouseLeftButtonUp="BtnJogCcw_Up"/>
                <Button Content="CW (정방향) ▶" Width="180" Height="44" Margin="4"
                        Background="#37474F" Foreground="White" BorderThickness="0"
                        FontSize="14" FontWeight="Bold"
                        PreviewMouseLeftButtonDown="BtnJogCw_Down"
                        PreviewMouseLeftButtonUp="BtnJogCw_Up"/>
            </StackPanel>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 6: 마지막 명령 표시 -->
        <Border Grid.Row="6" Background="#007ACC" Padding="6,3" VerticalAlignment="Bottom" CornerRadius="0,0,4,4">
            <TextBlock Text="{Binding LastCmd}" Foreground="White" FontSize="11"/>
        </Border>
    </Grid>
</Window>

빌드했습니다.

content.text: `Grid` → `UniformGrid Columns="5" Height="40"` 으로 변경. 5개 버튼이 동일 크기/높이로 균등 배치됩니다. 재실행해서 확인해주세요.

XAML 파일은 있습니다. `ServoTestWindow.xaml` + `ServoControlViewModel.cs`로 분리해서 작성했습니다.

혹시 Visual Studio에서 디자이너 미리보기가 안 보인다는 뜻인가요? 아니면 화면에서 특정 부분이 표시가 안 되는 건가요? 스크린샷 찍어주시면 어떤 상황인지 바로 확인할 수 있습니다.

message.content:
This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   - User is working on 1cellAssembleMachine project, handling C# side only (another Claude handles PLC ST code)
   - Project: .NET 8.0 WPF app (`PLC_ST/c#/AssembleMonitor/`) communicating with LS XEC PLC via XGT FEnet (TCP 192.168.0.50:2004)
   - Requested I/O monitor UI overhaul: remove log panel, show Input/Output/Servo+System in 3-column single view
   - Requested servo control panel with status display, parameter input, command buttons, and JOG control
   - Multiple UI polish requests: disable grid sorting, fix LED panel position, add SET buttons for servo WRITE areas, fix button alignment

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - XGT FEnet protocol (TCP, 20-byte header, %MW→%MB address conversion, Reserved 2B required)
   - PLC memory map: MW100~109(Input READ), MW200~209(Output WRITE), MW300~301(Servo cmd WRITE), MW310~319(Servo params WRITE), MW400~401(Servo status READ), MW410~415(Servo values READ), MW500~501(System R/W)
   - DINT split: MW하위 = value & 0xFFFF, MW상위 = (value >> 16) & 0xFFFF
   - JOG control: %UW0.9.1 direct write (bit0=CW, bit1=CCW), not through MW area
   - PLC SafetyStop blocks output writes (EMO NC not wired → always active)
   - WPF MVVM pattern with DataTrigger for LED indicators
   - DockPanel layout for fixed-position elements

3. Files and Code Sections:

   - **`Features/IoMonitor/IoMonitorWindow.xaml`** — Main I/O monitor UI
     - Major rewrite: TabControl → 3-column Grid (Input|Output|Servo+System)
     - Removed right-side log panel entirely
     - Added `CanUserSortColumns="False"` to DataGrid global style
     - Changed top bar to DockPanel: LED panel `DockPanel.Dock="Right"` (fixed position)
     - ConnectionStatus TextBlock removed (by screenshot-viewer agent) since info shown in status bar
     - Added SET toggle button column for servo/system WRITE words with `Visibility="{Binding DataContext.IsWritable, ...Converter={StaticResource BoolToVis}}"`
     - Font size 10px, row height 18px, WindowState="Maximized"

   - **`Features/IoMonitor/IoMonitorWindow.xaml.cs`** — Code-behind
     - Removed: BtnToggleLog_Click, BtnClearLog_Click, TxtLog_TextChanged handlers
     - Added: BtnServoToggle_Click handler for servo/system WRITE bit toggling

   - **`Features/IoMonitor/IoMonitorViewModel.cs`** — I/O monitor ViewModel
     - Removed: All log-related code (StringBuilder _logDisplay/_logPending, FlushLog, AppendLog, ToggleLog, ClearLog, LogText/IsLogEnabled/LogButtonText properties)
     - Removed: `_client.OnLog = AppendLog;` 
     - Added: `_servoSysCache` array, `ServoSysMwAddresses` mapping [300,301,400,401,500,501]
     - Added: `ToggleServoSystemBitAsync(int wordIndex, int bitIndex)` method
     - Added: `Array.Copy(servoSysData, _servoSysCache, 6)` in poll loop for cache sync
     - WordViewModel got `IsWritable` property: `public bool IsWritable => Direction == "WRITE";`

   - **`Features/ServoTest/ServoControlViewModel.cs`** — NEW: Servo control ViewModel
     - Status properties: StsMoving, StsError, StsRdy, StsServoMc, RspHomeDone, RspMoveDone, RspHomeErr, RspMoveErr, RspResetDone
     - Value properties: ActPos, ActVel, ErrCode, ActPosDeg (calculated)
     - Parameter properties: TargetPosText, TargetVelText, IsMoveRel
     - Commands: CmdHomeAsync (MW300.0), CmdMoveAsync (MW310~313 + MW301.1 + MW300.1), CmdStopAsync (MW300.4), CmdResetAsync (MW300.5), CmdClearAsync (MW300=0)
     - JOG: JogCwAsync/JogCcwAsync writing to %UW0.9.1
     - WriteMw300Bit helper: read-modify-write pattern for MW300
     - 100ms polling loop reading MW400~401 (status bits) and MW410~414 (values)
     - Separate XgtClient instance (independent from I/O monitor)

   - **`Features/ServoTest/ServoTestWindow.xaml`** — Complete rewrite: Servo control panel UI
     - GroupBox sections: Connection, Status LEDs (MW400/401), Current Values (MW410~414), Parameters (MW310~313), Commands (MW300), JOG (%UW0.9.1)
     - LED Ellipses with inline DataTrigger bindings for each status bit
     - Command buttons changed from Grid to `UniformGrid Columns="5" Height="40"` for alignment
     - JOG buttons with PreviewMouseLeftButtonDown/Up for press-hold behavior
     - `SizeToContent="Height"` added for auto height
     - Dark theme consistent with IoMonitor

   - **`Features/ServoTest/ServoTestWindow.xaml.cs`** — Clean code-behind
     - Minimal handlers delegating to ViewModel methods
     - JOG mouse down/up handlers

   - **`MainWindow.xaml`** — Added "서보 제어 열기" button (green, above I/O monitor button)
   - **`MainWindow.xaml.cs`** — Added BtnServoControl_Click handler opening ServoTestWindow

   - **`Features/IoMonitor/MemoryMapDefinition.cs`** — Read-only reference, defines InputMap (MW0100~0109), OutputMap (MW0200~0209), ServoAndSystemMap (MW0300,0301,0400,0401,0500,0501) with bit-level names

   - **`Features/Communication/XgtClient.cs`** — XGT FEnet TCP client (unchanged), ReadWordsAsync/WriteWordsAsync with SemaphoreSlim

4. Errors and fixes:
   - **LED panel shifting**: User complained LED panel moved left/right as ConnectionStatus text changed length. Fixed by using DockPanel with LED `DockPanel.Dock="Right"` instead of StackPanel.
   - **DataGrid header sorting**: User wanted sorting disabled. Fixed with `CanUserSortColumns="False"` in global DataGrid style.
   - **Command buttons alignment**: 5 buttons in servo panel had uneven sizes/positions using Grid. Fixed by changing to `UniformGrid Columns="5" Height="40"`.
   - **Window content clipped**: Servo panel buttons cut off at bottom. Fixed by adding `SizeToContent="Height"`.
   - **ConnectionStatus label redundant**: User said remove it since info shown at bottom status bar. Removed by screenshot-viewer agent.
   - **WPF Designer preview not working**: Current unresolved issue - user reports ServoTestWindow.xaml designer preview doesn't render.

5. Problem Solving:
   - Solved I/O monitor layout for 1920x1080: 3-column with 10px font, 18px row height
   - Solved servo command pattern: read MW300 → modify bit → write back
   - Solved DINT parameter writing: split int32 to two ushort words
   - PLC SafetyStop (EMO not wired) blocks output writes — identified as hardware issue, not solvable from C# side
   - Error code 221 in MW414 confirmed as APM FB STAT combined value

6. All user messages:
   - "C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\1cellAssembleMachine - 다른 클로드가 PLC 쪽 담당하고 있으니 넌 c# 쪽만 담당할거야 기존 자료 확인해줘"
   - "i/o 모니터 우측에 로그 이제 안나와도 되겠다 지우고 한 화면에 입력/출력/서보.시스템 다 볼수있게는 안되겠제 ?"
   - "1920 / 1080 이 화면 최대 크기임"
   - "글자를 좀 줄이면 안되나"
   - "1. c# 그리드 상단 타이틀 클릭시 자동 정렬되는 기능 삭제. 2. 상단의 좌측의 LED 패널은 우측으로 고정. 라벨이 업데이트 되면서 와리가리해서 거슬림"
   - "서보 제어부 출력도 버튼으로 강제 살릴수 있어야함"
   - "에러코드 221 이 MW414 값 인가 ?"
   - "그게 아니라 코드에서 프로그램 시작시 강제로 살리는 신호가 있는지"
   - "강제로 살리는 신호 혹시 있나 ?"
   - Servo control panel implementation request (detailed spec with MW addresses)
   - "/sc 이건 처리가 안되서 표시 안되는 거냐 ?"
   - "/sc 상단에 연결 해제 버튼 정렬 안됨 우측에 라벨은 제거 해줘 하단에 나오니"
   - "/sc 버튼 하단 정렬 !"
   - "뷰가 따로 없네 코드로 작성된거인듯 ?"
   - "디자이너 미리보기 가 안되네"

7. Pending Tasks:
   - Fix WPF designer preview not working for ServoTestWindow.xaml
   - Remaining project work (from CLAUDE.md): output toggle verification after PLC SafetyStop resolved, station sequencer logic porting (Phase 3)

8. Current Work:
   User reported that WPF designer preview ("디자이너 미리보기") is not working for the servo control panel. This is likely caused by the inline DataTrigger styles used for LED Ellipses in ServoTestWindow.xaml, or possibly the `SizeToContent="Height"` attribute, or design-time DataContext issues. The last message was: "디자이너 미리보기 가 안되네" (designer preview doesn't work).

9. Optional Next Step:
   Investigate and fix the WPF designer preview issue for ServoTestWindow.xaml. This likely requires adding a design-time DataContext (`d:DataContext`) or simplifying the inline styles that may cause the designer to fail. The user's exact words were "디자이너 미리보기 가 안되네" confirming the designer isn't rendering the servo control panel.

If you need specific details from before compaction (like exact code snippets, error messages, or content you generated), read the full transcript at: C:\Users\Administrator\.claude\projects\C--Users-Administrator-Desktop\882c2cc2-ab07-46c8-925d-cb1f69b70bdc.jsonl
Continue the conversation from where it left off without asking the user any further questions. Resume directly — do not acknowledge the summary, do not recap what was happening, do not preface with "I'll continue" or similar. Pick up the last task as if the break never happened.

content.text: 디자이너 미리보기 문제를 확인하겠습니다. `d:DesignInstance`를 추가하면 해결될 가능성이 높습니다.

WPF 디자이너 미리보기가 안 되는 원인은 ViewModel 생성자에서 `XgtClient`를 생성하고, `Application.Current`를 사용하는 부분 때문입니다. 디자인 타임에는 이런 런타임 의존성이 실패합니다.

두 가지를 수정합니다:
1. XAML에 `d:DataContext` 추가
2. ViewModel에 디자인 타임 가드 추가
