toolUseResult.originalFile:
<Window x:Class="AssembleMonitor.Features.ServoTest.ServoTestWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        Title="서보 제어 패널 — 1CELL Assemble" Width="600" Height="780"
        Background="#1E1E1E" Foreground="#E0E0E0"
        WindowStartupLocation="CenterScreen" SizeToContent="Height">

    <Window.Resources>
        <BooleanToVisibilityConverter x:Key="BoolToVis"/>
        <!-- LED 스타일 (ON=색상, OFF=회색) -->
        <Style x:Key="LedOn" TargetType="Ellipse">
            <Setter Property="Width" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="Height" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="GroupBox">
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#AAA"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="Margin" Value="0,0,0,6"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="6,4"/>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="TextBlock">
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="12"/>
            <Setter Property="VerticalAlignment" Value="Center"/>
        </Style>
    </Window.Resources>

    <Grid Margin="10">
        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
        </Grid.RowDefinitions>

        <!-- 0: 연결 -->
        <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#333337" Padding="8,4" Margin="0,0,0,6" CornerRadius="4">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                <Button Content="연결" Width="60" Height="28" Margin="0,0,6,0"
                        Click="BtnConnect_Click" Background="#007ACC" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                <Button Content="해제" Width="60" Height="28" Margin="0,0,12,0"
                        Click="BtnDisconnect_Click" Background="#C62828" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                <TextBlock Text="{Binding ConnStatus}" FontWeight="SemiBold" FontSize="13"/>
                <TextBlock Text="{Binding CycleMs, StringFormat=' ({0}ms)'}" Foreground="#808080" Margin="4,0"/>
            </StackPanel>
        </Border>

        <!-- 1: 서보 상태 LED -->
        <GroupBox Grid.Row="1" Header="서보 상태 (MW400/401)">
            <Grid>
                <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

                <!-- MW400 상태 비트 -->
                <StackPanel Grid.Column="0">
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding Mw400Hex}" Foreground="#808080" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="10" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding StsMoving}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="MOVING" FontSize="11" Margin="0,0,12,0"/>
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding StsError}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#F44336"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="ERROR" FontSize="11" Foreground="#F44336"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding StsRdy}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="RDY" FontSize="11" Margin="0,0,12,0"/>
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding StsServoMc}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#2196F3"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="SERVO_MC" FontSize="11"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </StackPanel>

                <!-- MW401 응답 비트 -->
                <StackPanel Grid.Column="1">
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding Mw401Hex}" Foreground="#808080" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="10" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding RspHomeDone}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="HOME_DONE" FontSize="11" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding RspMoveDone}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="MOVE_DONE" FontSize="11"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding RspHomeErr}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#F44336"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="HOME_ERR" FontSize="11" Foreground="#F44336" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding RspMoveErr}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#F44336"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="MOVE_ERR" FontSize="11" Foreground="#F44336"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding RspResetDone}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="RESET_DONE" FontSize="11"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </StackPanel>
            </Grid>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 2: 현재값 표시 -->
        <GroupBox Grid.Row="2" Header="현재값 (MW410~414)">
            <UniformGrid Columns="4">
                <StackPanel Margin="2">
                    <TextBlock Text="현재 위치" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPos}" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="18" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                </StackPanel>
                <StackPanel Margin="2">
                    <TextBlock Text="위치 (도)" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPosDeg}" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="18" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                </StackPanel>
                <StackPanel Margin="2">
                    <TextBlock Text="현재 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActVel}" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="18" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                </StackPanel>
                <StackPanel Margin="2">
                    <TextBlock Text="에러 코드" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding ErrCode}" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="18" Foreground="#F44747"/>
                </StackPanel>
            </UniformGrid>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 3: 파라미터 입력 -->
        <GroupBox Grid.Row="3" Header="파라미터 (MW310~313, MW301)">
            <Grid>
                <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                <TextBlock Grid.Column="0" Text="목표위치:" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>
                <TextBox Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding TargetPosText, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                         Background="#2A2A2A" Foreground="#4FC1FF" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="14"
                         BorderBrush="#555" Padding="4,2" VerticalContentAlignment="Center"/>
                <TextBlock Grid.Column="2" Text="  속도:" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>
                <TextBox Grid.Column="3" Text="{Binding TargetVelText, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                         Background="#2A2A2A" Foreground="#B5CEA8" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="14"
                         BorderBrush="#555" Padding="4,2" VerticalContentAlignment="Center"/>
                <CheckBox Grid.Column="4" Content="상대이동" IsChecked="{Binding IsMoveRel}"
                          Foreground="#E0E0E0" Margin="8,0,0,0" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
            </Grid>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 4: 명령 버튼 -->
        <GroupBox Grid.Row="4" Header="명령 (MW300)">
            <UniformGrid Columns="5" Height="40">
                <Button Content="원점복귀" Margin="2"
                        Click="BtnHome_Click" Background="#1B5E20" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12"/>
                <Button Content="이동" Margin="2"
                        Click="BtnMove_Click" Background="#0D47A1" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12"/>
                <Button Content="정지" Margin="2"
                        Click="BtnStop_Click" Background="#C62828" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12"/>
                <Button Content="리셋" Margin="2"
                        Click="BtnReset_Click" Background="#E65100" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12"/>
                <Button Content="클리어" Margin="2"
                        Click="BtnClear_Click" Background="#444" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontSize="12" ToolTip="MW300=0 전체 OFF"/>
            </UniformGrid>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 5: JOG 버튼 -->
        <GroupBox Grid.Row="5" Header="JOG (%UW0.9.1) — 누르는 동안 동작">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                <Button Content="◀ CCW (역방향)" Width="180" Height="44" Margin="4"
                        Background="#37474F" Foreground="White" BorderThickness="0"
                        FontSize="14" FontWeight="Bold"
                        PreviewMouseLeftButtonDown="BtnJogCcw_Down"
                        PreviewMouseLeftButtonUp="BtnJogCcw_Up"/>
                <Button Content="CW (정방향) ▶" Width="180" Height="44" Margin="4"
                        Background="#37474F" Foreground="White" BorderThickness="0"
                        FontSize="14" FontWeight="Bold"
                        PreviewMouseLeftButtonDown="BtnJogCw_Down"
                        PreviewMouseLeftButtonUp="BtnJogCw_Up"/>
            </StackPanel>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 6: 마지막 명령 표시 -->
        <Border Grid.Row="6" Background="#007ACC" Padding="6,3" VerticalAlignment="Bottom" CornerRadius="0,0,4,4">
            <TextBlock Text="{Binding LastCmd}" Foreground="White" FontSize="11"/>
        </Border>
    </Grid>
</Window>

file.content:
<Window x:Class="AssembleMonitor.Features.ServoTest.ServoTestWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        xmlns:d="http://schemas.microsoft.com/expression/blend/2008"
        xmlns:mc="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/markup-compatibility/2006"
        xmlns:local="clr-namespace:AssembleMonitor.Features.ServoTest"
        mc:Ignorable="d"
        d:DataContext="{d:DesignInstance Type=local:ServoControlViewModel, IsDesignTimeCreatable=True}"
        Title="서보 제어 패널 — 1CELL Assemble" Width="600" Height="780"
        Background="#1E1E1E" Foreground="#E0E0E0"
        WindowStartupLocation="CenterScreen" SizeToContent="Height">

    <Window.Resources>
        <BooleanToVisibilityConverter x:Key="BoolToVis"/>
        <!-- LED 스타일 (ON=색상, OFF=회색) -->
        <Style x:Key="LedOn" TargetType="Ellipse">
            <Setter Property="Width" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="Height" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="GroupBox">
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#AAA"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="Margin" Value="0,0,0,6"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="6,4"/>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="TextBlock">
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="12"/>
            <Setter Property="VerticalAlignment" Value="Center"/>
        </Style>
    </Window.Resources>

    <Grid Margin="10">
        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
        </Grid.RowDefinitions>

        <!-- 0: 연결 -->
        <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#333337" Padding="8,4" Margin="0,0,0,6" CornerRadius="4">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                <Button Content="연결" Width="60" Height="28" Margin="0,0,6,0"
                        Click="BtnConnect_Click" Background="#007ACC" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                <Button Content="해제" Width="60" Height="28" Margin="0,0,12,0"
                        Click="BtnDisconnect_Click" Background="#C62828" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                <TextBlock Text="{Binding ConnStatus}" FontWeight="SemiBold" FontSize="13"/>
                <TextBlock Text="{Binding CycleMs, StringFormat=' ({0}ms)'}" Foreground="#808080" Margin="4,0"/>
            </StackPanel>
        </Border>

        <!-- 1: 서보 상태 LED -->
        <GroupBox Grid.Row="1" Header="서보 상태 (MW400/401)">
            <Grid>
                <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

                <!-- MW400 상태 비트 -->
                <StackPanel Grid.Column="0">
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding Mw400Hex}" Foreground="#808080" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="10" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding StsMoving}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="MOVING" FontSize="11" Margin="0,0,12,0"/>
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding StsError}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#F44336"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="ERROR" FontSize="11" Foreground="#F44336"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding StsRdy}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="RDY" FontSize="11" Margin="0,0,12,0"/>
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding StsServoMc}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#2196F3"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="SERVO_MC" FontSize="11"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </StackPanel>

                <!-- MW401 응답 비트 -->
                <StackPanel Grid.Column="1">
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding Mw401Hex}" Foreground="#808080" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="10" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding RspHomeDone}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="HOME_DONE" FontSize="11" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding RspMoveDone}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="MOVE_DONE" FontSize="11"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding RspHomeErr}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#F44336"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="HOME_ERR" FontSize="11" Foreground="#F44336" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding RspMoveErr}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#F44336"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="MOVE_ERR" FontSize="11" Foreground="#F44336"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding RspResetDone}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="RESET_DONE" FontSize="11"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </StackPanel>
            </Grid>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 2: 현재값 표시 -->
        <GroupBox Grid.Row="2" Header="현재값 (MW410~414)">
            <UniformGrid Columns="4">
                <StackPanel Margin="2">
                    <TextBlock Text="현재 위치" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPos}" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="18" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                </StackPanel>
                <StackPanel Margin="2">
                    <TextBlock Text="위치 (도)" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPosDeg}" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="18" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                </StackPanel>
                <StackPanel Margin="2">
                    <TextBlock Text="현재 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActVel}" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="18" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                </StackPanel>
                <StackPanel Margin="2">
                    <TextBlock Text="에러 코드" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding ErrCode}" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="18" Foreground="#F44747"/>
                </StackPanel>
            </UniformGrid>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 3: 파라미터 입력 -->
        <GroupBox Grid.Row="3" Header="파라미터 (MW310~313, MW301)">
            <Grid>
                <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                <TextBlock Grid.Column="0" Text="목표위치:" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>
                <TextBox Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding TargetPosText, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                         Background="#2A2A2A" Foreground="#4FC1FF" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="14"
                         BorderBrush="#555" Padding="4,2" VerticalContentAlignment="Center"/>
                <TextBlock Grid.Column="2" Text="  속도:" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>
                <TextBox Grid.Column="3" Text="{Binding TargetVelText, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                         Background="#2A2A2A" Foreground="#B5CEA8" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="14"
                         BorderBrush="#555" Padding="4,2" VerticalContentAlignment="Center"/>
                <CheckBox Grid.Column="4" Content="상대이동" IsChecked="{Binding IsMoveRel}"
                          Foreground="#E0E0E0" Margin="8,0,0,0" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
            </Grid>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 4: 명령 버튼 -->
        <GroupBox Grid.Row="4" Header="명령 (MW300)">
            <UniformGrid Columns="5" Height="40">
                <Button Content="원점복귀" Margin="2"
                        Click="BtnHome_Click" Background="#1B5E20" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12"/>
                <Button Content="이동" Margin="2"
                        Click="BtnMove_Click" Background="#0D47A1" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12"/>
                <Button Content="정지" Margin="2"
                        Click="BtnStop_Click" Background="#C62828" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12"/>
                <Button Content="리셋" Margin="2"
                        Click="BtnReset_Click" Background="#E65100" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12"/>
                <Button Content="클리어" Margin="2"
                        Click="BtnClear_Click" Background="#444" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontSize="12" ToolTip="MW300=0 전체 OFF"/>
            </UniformGrid>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 5: JOG 버튼 -->
        <GroupBox Grid.Row="5" Header="JOG (%UW0.9.1) — 누르는 동안 동작">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                <Button Content="◀ CCW (역방향)" Width="180" Height="44" Margin="4"
                        Background="#37474F" Foreground="White" BorderThickness="0"
                        FontSize="14" FontWeight="Bold"
                        PreviewMouseLeftButtonDown="BtnJogCcw_Down"
                        PreviewMouseLeftButtonUp="BtnJogCcw_Up"/>
                <Button Content="CW (정방향) ▶" Width="180" Height="44" Margin="4"
                        Background="#37474F" Foreground="White" BorderThickness="0"
                        FontSize="14" FontWeight="Bold"
                        PreviewMouseLeftButtonDown="BtnJogCw_Down"
                        PreviewMouseLeftButtonUp="BtnJogCw_Up"/>
            </StackPanel>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 6: 마지막 명령 표시 -->
        <Border Grid.Row="6" Background="#007ACC" Padding="6,3" VerticalAlignment="Bottom" CornerRadius="0,0,4,4">
            <TextBlock Text="{Binding LastCmd}" Foreground="White" FontSize="11"/>
        </Border>
    </Grid>
</Window>

                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding Mw401Hex}" Foreground="#808080" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="10" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding RspHomeDone}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="HOME_DONE" FontSize="11" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding RspMoveDone}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="MOVE_DONE" FontSize="11"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding RspHomeErr}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#F44336"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="HOME_ERR" FontSize="11" Foreground="#F44336" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding RspMoveErr}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#F44336"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="MOVE_ERR" FontSize="11" Foreground="#F44336"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding RspResetDone}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="RESET_DONE" FontSize="11"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </StackPanel>
            </Grid>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 2: 현재값 표시 -->
        <GroupBox Grid.Row="2" Header="현재값 (MW410~414)">
            <UniformGrid Columns="4">
                <StackPanel Margin="2">
                    <TextBlock Text="현재 위치" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPos}" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="18" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                </StackPanel>
                <StackPanel Margin="2">
                    <TextBlock Text="위치 (도)" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPosDeg}" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="18" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                </StackPanel>
                <StackPanel Margin="2">
                    <TextBlock Text="현재 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActVel}" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="18" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                </StackPanel>
                <StackPanel Margin="2">
                    <TextBlock Text="에러 코드" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding ErrCode}" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="18" Foreground="#F44747"/>
                </StackPanel>
            </UniformGrid>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 3: 파라미터 입력 -->
        <GroupBox Grid.Row="3" Header="파라미터 (MW310~313, MW301)">
            <Grid>
                <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                <TextBlock Grid.Column="0" Text="목표위치:" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>
                <TextBox Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding TargetPosText, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                         Background="#2A2A2A" Foreground="#4FC1FF" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="14"
                         BorderBrush="#555" Padding="4,2" VerticalContentAlignment="Center"/>
                <TextBlock Grid.Column="2" Text="  속도:" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>
                <TextBox Grid.Column="3" Text="{Binding TargetVelText, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                         Background="#2A2A2A" Foreground="#B5CEA8" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="14"
                         BorderBrush="#555" Padding="4,2" VerticalContentAlignment="Center"/>
                <CheckBox Grid.Column="4" Content="상대이동" IsChecked="{Binding IsMoveRel}"
                          Foreground="#E0E0E0" Margin="8,0,0,0" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
            </Grid>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 4: 명령 버튼 -->
        <GroupBox Grid.Row="4" Header="명령 (MW300)">
            <UniformGrid Columns="5" Height="40">
                <Button Content="원점복귀" Margin="2"
                        Click="BtnHome_Click" Background="#1B5E20" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12"/>
                <Button Content="이동" Margin="2"
                        Click="BtnMove_Click" Background="#0D47A1" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12"/>
                <Button Content="정지" Margin="2"
                        Click="BtnStop_Click" Background="#C62828" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12"/>
                <Button Content="리셋" Margin="2"
                        Click="BtnReset_Click" Background="#E65100" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12"/>
                <Button Content="클리어" Margin="2"
                        Click="BtnClear_Click" Background="#444" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontSize="12" ToolTip="MW300=0 전체 OFF"/>
            </UniformGrid>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 5: JOG 버튼 -->
        <GroupBox Grid.Row="5" Header="JOG (%UW0.9.1) — 누르는 동안 동작">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                <Button Content="◀ CCW (역방향)" Width="180" Height="44" Margin="4"
                        Background="#37474F" Foreground="White" BorderThickness="0"
                        FontSize="14" FontWeight="Bold"
                        PreviewMouseLeftButtonDown="BtnJogCcw_Down"
                        PreviewMouseLeftButtonUp="BtnJogCcw_Up"/>
                <Button Content="CW (정방향) ▶" Width="180" Height="44" Margin="4"
                        Background="#37474F" Foreground="White" BorderThickness="0"
                        FontSize="14" FontWeight="Bold"
                        PreviewMouseLeftButtonDown="BtnJogCw_Down"
                        PreviewMouseLeftButtonUp="BtnJogCw_Up"/>
            </StackPanel>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 6: 마지막 명령 표시 -->
        <Border Grid.Row="6" Background="#007ACC" Padding="6,3" VerticalAlignment="Bottom" CornerRadius="0,0,4,4">
            <TextBlock Text="{Binding LastCmd}" Foreground="White" FontSize="11"/>
        </Border>
    </Grid>
</Window>

content.text: U영역 GroupBox를 JOG 뒤에 추가하고, 마지막 명령 표시를 Row 7로 이동합니다.

<!-- 6: U영역 모니터 (슬롯9 위치결정 모듈) -->
        <GroupBox Grid.Row="6" Header="슬롯9 모듈 상태 (%UW0.9.0 / %UW0.9.1)">
            <Grid>
                <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

                <!-- %UW0.9.0 입력신호 -->
                <StackPanel Grid.Column="0">
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding Uw090Hex}" Foreground="#808080" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="10" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding UModuleRdy}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="MODULE RDY" FontSize="11" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="#4CAF50"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding UPosEl}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#FF9800"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="+EL (상한)" FontSize="11" Margin="0,0,12,0"/>
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding UNegEl}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#FF9800"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="-EL (하한)" FontSize="11"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding UDog}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#2196F3"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="DOG (근사원점)" FontSize="11" Margin="0,0,12,0"/>
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding UZPhase}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#2196F3"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="Z상" FontSize="11"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </StackPanel>

                <!-- %UW0.9.0 완료신호 + %UW0.9.1 -->
                <StackPanel Grid.Column="1">
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding Uw091Hex}" Foreground="#808080" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="10" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding UOrgDone}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="ORG 완료" FontSize="11" Margin="0,0,12,0"/>
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding UDstDone}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="DST 완료" FontSize="11"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </StackPanel>
            </Grid>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 7: 마지막 명령 표시 -->
        <Border Grid.Row="7" Background="#007ACC" Padding="6,3" VerticalAlignment="Bottom" CornerRadius="0,0,4,4">
            <TextBlock Text="{Binding LastCmd}" Foreground="White" FontSize="11"/>
        </Border>

toolUseResult.originalFile:
<Window x:Class="AssembleMonitor.Features.ServoTest.ServoTestWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        xmlns:d="http://schemas.microsoft.com/expression/blend/2008"
        xmlns:mc="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/markup-compatibility/2006"
        xmlns:local="clr-namespace:AssembleMonitor.Features.ServoTest"
        mc:Ignorable="d"
        d:DataContext="{d:DesignInstance Type=local:ServoControlViewModel, IsDesignTimeCreatable=True}"
        Title="서보 제어 패널 — 1CELL Assemble" Width="600" Height="780"
        Background="#1E1E1E" Foreground="#E0E0E0"
        WindowStartupLocation="CenterScreen" SizeToContent="Height">

    <Window.Resources>
        <BooleanToVisibilityConverter x:Key="BoolToVis"/>
        <!-- LED 스타일 (ON=색상, OFF=회색) -->
        <Style x:Key="LedOn" TargetType="Ellipse">
            <Setter Property="Width" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="Height" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="GroupBox">
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#AAA"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="Margin" Value="0,0,0,6"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="6,4"/>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="TextBlock">
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="12"/>
            <Setter Property="VerticalAlignment" Value="Center"/>
        </Style>
    </Window.Resources>

    <Grid Margin="10">
        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
        </Grid.RowDefinitions>

        <!-- 0: 연결 -->
        <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#333337" Padding="8,4" Margin="0,0,0,6" CornerRadius="4">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                <Button Content="연결" Width="60" Height="28" Margin="0,0,6,0"
                        Click="BtnConnect_Click" Background="#007ACC" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                <Button Content="해제" Width="60" Height="28" Margin="0,0,12,0"
                        Click="BtnDisconnect_Click" Background="#C62828" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                <TextBlock Text="{Binding ConnStatus}" FontWeight="SemiBold" FontSize="13"/>
                <TextBlock Text="{Binding CycleMs, StringFormat=' ({0}ms)'}" Foreground="#808080" Margin="4,0"/>
            </StackPanel>
        </Border>

        <!-- 1: 서보 상태 LED -->
        <GroupBox Grid.Row="1" Header="서보 상태 (MW400/401)">
            <Grid>
                <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

                <!-- MW400 상태 비트 -->
                <StackPanel Grid.Column="0">
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding Mw400Hex}" Foreground="#808080" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="10" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding StsMoving}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="MOVING" FontSize="11" Margin="0,0,12,0"/>
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding StsError}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#F44336"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="ERROR" FontSize="11" Foreground="#F44336"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding StsRdy}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="RDY" FontSize="11" Margin="0,0,12,0"/>
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding StsServoMc}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#2196F3"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="SERVO_MC" FontSize="11"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </StackPanel>

                <!-- MW401 응답 비트 -->
                <StackPanel Grid.Column="1">
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding Mw401Hex}" Foreground="#808080" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="10" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding RspHomeDone}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="HOME_DONE" FontSize="11" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding RspMoveDone}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="MOVE_DONE" FontSize="11"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding RspHomeErr}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#F44336"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="HOME_ERR" FontSize="11" Foreground="#F44336" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding RspMoveErr}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#F44336"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="MOVE_ERR" FontSize="11" Foreground="#F44336"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                        <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style><Style TargetType="Ellipse"><Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                <Style.Triggers><DataTrigger Binding="{Binding RspResetDone}" Value="True">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/></DataTrigger></Style.Triggers>
                            </Style></Ellipse.Style></Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="RESET_DONE" FontSize="11"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </StackPanel>
            </Grid>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 2: 현재값 표시 -->
        <GroupBox Grid.Row="2" Header="현재값 (MW410~414)">
            <UniformGrid Columns="4">
                <StackPanel Margin="2">
                    <TextBlock Text="현재 위치" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPos}" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="18" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                </StackPanel>
                <StackPanel Margin="2">
                    <TextBlock Text="위치 (도)" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPosDeg}" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="18" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                </StackPanel>
                <StackPanel Margin="2">
                    <TextBlock Text="현재 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActVel}" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="18" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                </StackPanel>
                <StackPanel Margin="2">
                    <TextBlock Text="에러 코드" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding ErrCode}" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="18" Foreground="#F44747"/>
                </StackPanel>
            </UniformGrid>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 3: 파라미터 입력 -->
        <GroupBox Grid.Row="3" Header="파라미터 (MW310~313, MW301)">
            <Grid>
                <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                <TextBlock Grid.Column="0" Text="목표위치:" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>
                <TextBox Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding TargetPosText, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                         Background="#2A2A2A" Foreground="#4FC1FF" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="14"
                         BorderBrush="#555" Padding="4,2" VerticalContentAlignment="Center"/>
                <TextBlock Grid.Column="2" Text="  속도:" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>
                <TextBox Grid.Column="3" Text="{Binding TargetVelText, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                         Background="#2A2A2A" Foreground="#B5CEA8" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="14"
                         BorderBrush="#555" Padding="4,2" VerticalContentAlignment="Center"/>
                <CheckBox Grid.Column="4" Content="상대이동" IsChecked="{Binding IsMoveRel}"
                          Foreground="#E0E0E0" Margin="8,0,0,0" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
            </Grid>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 4: 명령 버튼 -->
        <GroupBox Grid.Row="4" Header="명령 (MW300)">
            <UniformGrid Columns="5" Height="40">
                <Button Content="원점복귀" Margin="2"
                        Click="BtnHome_Click" Background="#1B5E20" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12"/>
                <Button Content="이동" Margin="2"
                        Click="BtnMove_Click" Background="#0D47A1" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12"/>
                <Button Content="정지" Margin="2"
                        Click="BtnStop_Click" Background="#C62828" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12"/>
                <Button Content="리셋" Margin="2"
                        Click="BtnReset_Click" Background="#E65100" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12"/>
                <Button Content="클리어" Margin="2"
                        Click="BtnClear_Click" Background="#444" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontSize="12" ToolTip="MW300=0 전체 OFF"/>
            </UniformGrid>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 5: JOG 버튼 -->
        <GroupBox Grid.Row="5" Header="JOG (%UW0.9.1) — 누르는 동안 동작">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                <Button Content="◀ CCW (역방향)" Width="180" Height="44" Margin="4"
                        Background="#37474F" Foreground="White" BorderThickness="0"
                        FontSize="14" FontWeight="Bold"
                        PreviewMouseLeftButtonDown="BtnJogCcw_Down"
                        PreviewMouseLeftButtonUp="BtnJogCcw_Up"/>
                <Button Content="CW (정방향) ▶" Width="180" Height="44" Margin="4"
                        Background="#37474F" Foreground="White" BorderThickness="0"
                        FontSize="14" FontWeight="Bold"
                        PreviewMouseLeftButtonDown="BtnJogCw_Down"
                        PreviewMouseLeftButtonUp="BtnJogCw_Up"/>
            </StackPanel>
        </GroupBox>

        <!-- 6: 마지막 명령 표시 -->
        <Border Grid.Row="6" Background="#007ACC" Padding="6,3" VerticalAlignment="Bottom" CornerRadius="0,0,4,4">
            <TextBlock Text="{Binding LastCmd}" Foreground="White" FontSize="11"/>
        </Border>
    </Grid>
</Window>

성공. 빌드 완료.

**빌드 결과: 성공**

- 경고: 0개
- 오류: 0개
- 경과 시간: 1.00초

`C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\1cellAssembleMachine\PLC_ST\c#\AssembleMonitor\bin\Debug\net8.0-windows\AssembleMonitor.dll`

빌드 성공. 추가된 내용 정리:

**ViewModel (`ServoControlViewModel.cs`)**
- `%UW0.9.0` 비트 속성 7개: `UPosEl`(+EL), `UNegEl`(-EL), `UDog`(근사원점), `UZPhase`(Z상), `UOrgDone`, `UDstDone`, `UModuleRdy`(bit15)
- `Uw090Hex` / `Uw091Hex` — raw 16진수 표시
- 폴링 루프에 `ReadWordsAsync("%UW0.9.0", 2)` 추가 (100ms 주기)

**XAML (`ServoTestWindow.xaml`)**
- Row 6에 "슬롯9 모듈 상태" GroupBox 추가
- 좌측: UW0.9.0 — MODULE RDY(녹), +EL/-EL(주황), DOG/Z상(파랑)
- 우측: UW0.9.1 hex + ORG완료/DST완료(녹)
- 기존 마지막 명령 표시는 Row 7로 이동

message.content:
C# 쪽에서 U영역 모니터 잘 만들어줬습니다.

  슬롯9 모듈 상태 (%UW0.9.0 / %UW0.9.1):
  - 0x0000 / 0x0000 — 전부 OFF

  문제가 명확합니다:
  - MODULE RDY = OFF — 모듈 준비 안 됨
  - +EL, -EL, DOG, Z상 = 전부 OFF
  - ORG 완료, DST 완료 = OFF

  근데 MW400에서 RDY=ON, SERVO_MC=ON이고 모터가 실제로 돌고 있다면...

  U영역 읽기 주소가 잘못된 것 같습니다. C#에서 %UW0.9.0을 FEnet으로 읽을 때 바이트 주소 변환이 맞는지
  확인 필요합니다.

  %UW0.9.0 → FEnet 주소: %UB0.9.0 (워드→바이트 변환은 슬롯 내 오프셋에만 적용, base.slot.offset
  형식에서는 오프셋×2)

  C# 쪽에 확인 요청:
  - %UW0.9.0 읽기 시 FEnet 주소를 %UB0.9.0으로 보내고 있는지?
  - MW영역처럼 인덱스×2 변환을 적용했다면 잘못됨 — U영역은 %UB base.slot.offset 형태 그대로 사용

  아니면 MW400.4 (STS_RDY)가 ON인 것 자체가 PROG_SERVO.st에서 %UW0.9.0을 정상적으로 읽고 있다는 뜻이니,
   PLC 코드는 맞고 C# 통신 주소만 수정하면 됩니다.

content.text: 현재 변환 로직을 확인합니다.

확인 완료. 현재 변환:
- `%UW0.9.0` → `%UB0.9.0` (W→B만 교체, 오프셋 변환 없음)
- `%UW0.9.1` → `%UB0.9.1` ← **여기가 문제!**

U영역 dot notation에서 마지막 숫자는 **워드 오프셋**이므로, 바이트 주소로 변환 시 **오프셋×2** 적용 필요:
- `%UW0.9.0` → `%UB0.9.0` (0×2=0, 동일)
- `%UW0.9.1` → `%UB0.9.2` (1×2=2)

읽기에서 `%UB0.9.0` count=4 자체는 맞지만, JOG 쓰기도 `%UB0.9.1`로 보내고 있어서 **바이트 1(워드0의 상위바이트)**에 쓰고 있었을 수 있습니다.

I/Q/U 영역 전부 오프셋 ×2 변환을 적용하겠습니다.

-        // I/Q/U 영역: %IW0.0.0 → %IB0.0.0 (dot 형식은 index 변환 불요)

**수정 내용 (`XgtProtocol.cs`)**:

| 변환 전 (기존) | 변환 후 (수정) | 설명 |
|---|---|---|
| `%UW0.9.0` → `%UB0.9.0` | `%UB0.9.0` (0×2=0) | 동일 |
| `%UW0.9.1` → `%UB0.9.1` | `%UB0.9.2` (1×2=2) | **수정됨** |

정규식을 `base.slot.offset` 구조로 분리하여 마지막 오프셋만 ×2 적용하도록 변경했습니다. I/Q/U 영역 모두 동일 규칙 적용.

JOG 쓰기(`%UW0.9.1`)도 이제 `%UB0.9.2`로 정상 변환됩니다. 기존에 `%UB0.9.1`(바이트1 = 워드0 상위바이트)에 쓰고 있었는데, 그래도 JOG가 동작했다면 PLC 쪽에서 바이트 단위로 처리했을 수 있습니다.

실행해서 U영역 모니터 값이 바뀌는지 확인해주세요.
